Description: StormX' is a revolutionary Chrome extension and app that lets users earn cryptocurrency in a variety of ways. The STMX token provides users with cryptocurrency rewards when they shop online using the App or browser extension.

Name: Verge
Description: The Verge cryptocurrency and blockchain were created as a privacy-focused alternative to bitcoin (BTC), offering a fast, efficient, decentralized payment system. Additionally, it supports anonymity networks such as Tor and allows transactions to be sent to stealth addresses.

Name: Beta Finance
Description: Using Beta Finance, crypto-assets can be borrowed, lent, and shorted without permission on Ethereum. Users have access to an automated and permissionless money market where tokens can freely and automatically be listed. After their launch on Ethereum Mainnet, Beta Finance plans on launching on additional layers one and two solutions.

Name: Savanna
Description: Savanna Finance focuses entirely on its algorithmic cross-chain stable coin protocol which is stabilized with real use-cases throughout the DeFi Ecosystem. SVN is their algorithmic stablecoin designed for price stability currently pegged to the value of one MMF (Mad Meerkat Finance).

Name: Bitcoin Cash
Description: Bitcoin Cash is a peer-to-peer cash system. There is no need for third parties and a Central Bank for this hassle-free decentralized cryptocurrency. As a result of a Bitcoin hard fork in August 2017, Bitcoin Cash was created. Due to its larger block size than Bitcoin, Bitcoin Cash allows more transactions per block.

Name: LEO Token
Description: The LEO Token (LEO) is a utility token intended for use on the Bitfinex exchange and other trading platforms operated by Bitfinex's parent company, iFinex. In addition to strengthening Bitfinex's community, the token is expected to optimize the platform's operations.

Name: The Sandbox
Description: The Sandbox is a community-driven platform that allows creators to monetize voxel assets (pixel with volume, hence vo-xel) and gaming experiences through blockchain. Through The Sandbox, creators will be able to own their creations as non-fungible tokens (NFTs) and be rewarded for taking part in the ecosystem.

Name: ApeCoin
Description: In the APE ecosystem, APECoin (APE) is the native token that will enable the decentralized community-building process. Two of the most popular NFT collections on the Ethereum blockchain are the Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) and Mutant Ape Yacht Club (MAYC).

Name: DeFiChain
Description: DeFiChain is a decentralized blockchain platform for providing decentralized financial services that are fast, intelligent, and transparent. It aims to bring full DeFi capabilities to the Bitcoin ecosystem. A hybrid Proof of Stake/Proof of Work consensus mechanism governs the network. Since DeFi transactions on DeFiChain are non-Turing complete, they flow quickly and smoothly at low gas rates and have reduced the risk of smart contract errors.

Name: STEPN
Description: STEPN is a social network and video game app for web3 users designed with GameFi and SocialFi features. By upgrading an old concept of exercising to move-to-earn, they have succeeded in making it fully functional and remarkably popular in the blockchain sector. STEPN makes it possible to promote socialization and assist users in maintaining a healthy lifestyle at the same time.

Name: Lido DAO
Description: Lido is an Ethereum liquid staking solution. With Lido, users can stake their ETH without maintaining any infrastructure or minimum deposits, as well as participate in on-chain activities such as lending. Lido DAO's native utility token, LDO, is used to grant governance rights, manage fee parameters and distribution, and manage the addition and removal of Lido node operators.

Name: Audius
Description: Blockchain-based, social music streaming service Audius utilizes blockchain technology to provide a decentralized music streaming experience. A community of artists, fans, and developers owns and runs it. Its native cryptocurrency is AUDIO.

Name: IoTeX
Description: In order to enable the open economics for machines, IoTeX developed a decentralized platform that enables people and machines to interact with guaranteed trust, free will, and under the condition of properly designed incentives.

Name: SKALE
Description: SKALE Network token (SKL) is a hybrid token that entitles its users to work as validators, stake as delegators, and rent Elastic Sidechains and Elastic Blockchains to access some of its resources. SKALE Network is a Web3 platform that was designed for the blockchain to be fast and configurable.

Name: OMG Network
Description: Using the OMG Network, projects run faster and cheaper without compromising Ethereum's security. For Ethereum, OMG Network is a non-custodial, trustless, Layer-2 scaling solution for transferring value. This gives you access to, management of, and the ability to transact with digital assets securely stored on the blockchain.

Name: Bitcoin Gold
Description: Bitcoin Gold was established in 2017 as a user-friendly alternative to Bitcoin. By combining the Bitcoin blockchain's security and stability with its ability for experimentation and development, BTG aims to enhance and extend the crypto space, BTG uses a blockchain similar to Bitcoin, without utilizing Bitcoin's hash power or competing for the title of "real Bitcoin".

Name: Swipe
Description: Using its API, Swipe creates global payment cards based on its native SXP token, bridging the fiat and cryptocurrency worlds. Swipe Tokens SXP are required in order to perform all the functions of the Swipe Wallet.

Name: WAX
Description: WAX has created blockchain-based tools that allow anyone to trade digital or physical items instantly and securely, anywhere in the world. With the Worldwide Asset Exchange, members can connect with a global network of traders and collectors, buyers and sellers, merchants, developers of dApps, and game developers.

Name: Siacoin
Description: The Siacoin (SC) is a native utility token of Sia, a distributed, decentralized cloud storage platform built on blockchain technology. In Sia, users can lease access to their unused storage space in a secure, trustless marketplace. Smart contracts ensure the enforcement of agreements and transactions, and Siacoin is the medium of exchange for payments for storage on the network.

Name: Songbird
Description: Songbird is a blockchain with a limited supply of tokens. Its purpose is to test features for the Flare layer-1 protocol on a related mainnet. The Songbird protocol is based on consensus, not mining or staking. In preparation for the actual launch, the Songbird Network is testing Flare's architecture, F-Asset, and FTSO's functionality, and ensuring the network's stability.

Name: DeFi Kingdoms
Description: Featuring nostalgic pixel art, DeFi Kingdoms is a play-to-earn RPG in the medieval style. The game is easy to play, easy to maneuver, and offers a simple way to get started. For all transactions, the game uses its own governance token, xJEWEL, for various activities including the purchase of heroes, summoning of heroes, exchange of xJEWEL, and staking.

Name: JUST
Description: The mission of the JUST project is to build a fair, decentralized financial system that provides stablecoin lending and governance mechanisms for users around the world. There are two tokens in the JUST ecosystem: USDJ and JUST (JST). The USDJ stablecoin's value is pegged to the value of the US dollar (USD), whereas the JST stablecoin can perform several functions, namely paying interest, maintaining the platform, supporting its governance, and regulating interest rates (stability fees), and the collateralization ratio.

Name: TitanSwap
Description: TitanSwap is a DeFi project that combines capabilities from its predecessors, providing millennials and Z-generations with financial products that can be controlled independently. Despite having a small number of digital assets, users with little understanding of advanced financial knowledge and no experience with on-chain transactions can participate in this project.

Name: Xido Finance
Description: XIDO is a decentralized AMM (Automated Market Maker) with yield farming incentives, no mints, and a unique token distribution system. A token that acts as a governance layer and powers self-sustaining pools and farms without requiring new tokens to be minted.

Name: APENFT
Description: APENFT was created to meet opportunities and address pain points within the industry. In order to build a bridge between world-class artists and the NFT world, APENFT invests in top NFT platforms and artworks, incubates leading NFT artists; sponsors art exhibitions and publications; sets up awards to support artistic creation and criticism, and establishes art collections.

Name: MMFinance
Description: MMFinance offers trade mining fee rebates via AMM & DEX on Cronos Chain. As well as having the lowest trading fees on Cronos Chain, MMFinance has the most comprehensive ecosystem on Cronos Chain with AMM/DEX, Yield Optimizer, and NFT.

Name: Biswap
Description: BSW is the decentralized exchange (DEX) for BEP-20 tokens on Binance Smart Chain (BSC). In addition to having the lowest transaction fees of any BSC exchange, Biswap promises to be committed to innovation through high-quality products and services in DeFi. Referrals can be earned from farms, launch pools, swaps, and a lottery through its referral program.

Name: VVS Finance
Description: VVS Finance is the most simple DeFi venue for everyone. VVS tokens are their native tokens for the platform. It is a utility, governance, and reward token with applications across the VVS platform.

Name: JOE
Description: JOE (JOE) is the native token of Trader Joe, a decentralized exchange (DEX) on the Avalanche (AVAX) blockchain that offers DeFi services, including swapping, staking, and yield farming.

Name: Multichain
Description: MultiChain is a blockchain platform that enables developers to build and deploy private blockchain applications within or between organizations. The platform provides a simple API and command-line interface that are suitable for financial transactions.

Name: MAI
Description: MIMATIC (MAI) is an algorithmic stablecoin collateralized with Matic tokens. It is a cryptocurrency that operates on the Polygon platform.

Name: Ronin
Description: Ronin is a blockchain for play-to-earn games based on EVM. One of the most popular play-to-earn games built on Ronin is Axie Infinity, a digital collectibles game.

Name: Mirror Protocol
Description: Mirror Protocol (MIR) was built on the Terra blockchain by Terraform Labs (TFL) as a synthetic assets protocol. Holders of the MIR token control the on-chain treasury and code changes of the Mirror Protocol from day one. MIR tokens won't be kept or sold by TFL, and no admin keys or access privileges will be granted.

Name: Aurora
Description: Aurora facilitates the migration of Ethereum users and dApps to the NEAR blockchain. By using the Rainbow Bridge, you can upload, interact with, and transfer assets between Ethereum, NEAR, and Aurora. It also allows you to interact with Solidity smart contracts on the NEAR blockchain.

Name: SafeMoon [OLD]
Description: The SafeMoon Protocol (SafeMoon) is a decentralized finance token (DeFi). SafeMoon's website states that during each trade, three operations are carried out: Reflection, Liquidity Acquisition, and Burn. SafetyMoon combines tokenomics with auto-liquidity generating technology.

Name: Meerkat Shares
Description: Savanna (SVN) maintains its peg to MMF (Mad Meerkat Finance) by using MSHARE, which is part of Mad Meerkat Finance. During times of network expansion, holders of MSHARE are rewarded with SVN.

Name: GMX
Description: GMX is a decentralized spot and perpetual exchange which supports zero swap fees and zero price impact trades. Market makers earn fees from market making, swap fees, leverage trading (spreads, funding fees, and liquidations), as well as asset rebalancing from a multi-asset pool that supports trading.

Name: Function X
Description: The Function X token represents the governance token for the Function X project. Function X tokens can be used for voting, collateral, generating synthetic assets, delegates, and securing the core network. Function X can be transferred between both blockchains with a fixed total supply and liquidity while they are fully interoperable.

Name: Boba Network
Description: The Enya team built the Boba Network as a core contributor to the OMG Foundation as a scaling & augmentation solution for Ethereum. With Boba, Ethereum users can reduce gas fees, improve transaction throughput, and extend smart contract capabilities

Name: Alpha Venture DAO
Description: Alpha Finance Lab consists of DeFi's products that will work together to maximize returns for users while minimizing risk. Alpha products are designed to address unmet demand in DeFi through innovative and user-friendly solutions. Due to the launch of ALPHA tokenomics, ALPHA holders can stake ALPHA tokens to earn fees from the entire Alpha ecosystem and unlock product-specific features as ALPHA stakers.

Name: sETH2
Description: StakeWise is a liquid Ethereum staking protocol that gives DeFi users access to the earnings potential of ETH2. By tokenizing staker rewards separately from deposits, the protocol enables staked ETH capital to be applied to DeFi, returns compounded, and capital managed more efficiently.

Name: Aragon
Description: Aragon (ANT) is a decentralized platform built on the Ethereum network that allows the creation and management of dApps, cryptoprotocols, and decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs). Its holders will be able to govern the Aragon Network by using ANT ERC-20 tokens.

Name: Tokamak Network
Description: The Tokamak Network uses plasma and rollup to boost interoperability, scalability, functionality, and usability while Ethereum's blockchain ensures security and data availability. On-demand layer 2 solutions can be opened by anyone to meet their specific scalability requirements. Tokamak Network's mission is to support various services, such as DApp projects and Ethereum infrastructure solutions, in order to help Ethereum achieve mass adoption.

Name: Band Protocol
Description: Band Protocol is a cross-chain data oracle platform that is able to take real-world data and supply it to on-chain applications, while also connecting APIs to smart contracts to facilitate the exchange of information between on-chain and off-chain data sources. By supplying reputable, verifiable real-world data to blockchains, Band Protocol unlocks a range of new use cases for developers to explore, since they can now use any type of real-world data as part of their decentralized application (DApp) logic, including sports, weather, random numbers, price feed data and more.

Name: BakerySwap
Description: BakerySwap describes itself as the next generation of Uniswap. BakerySwap is intended to be faster, cheaper, and tastier. BAKE tokens will be issued to liquidity providers, who can then use them to earn a share of BakerySwap's trading fees as well as cast votes during BakerySwap's governance.

Name: Poollotto.finance
Description: Poollotto Token (PLT) offers non-centralized management of the global community lottery pools, automated payments, and safe payments via smart contracts based on lottery tokens. PLT Token was established to provide users around the world with transparent and fair outcomes through a blockchain-based platform and token economy.

Name: Redacted Cartel
Description: A subDAO of Olympus DAO, Redacted Cartel intends to leverage Protocol Controlled Value (PCV) to positively influence DeFi governance, in particular within the Curve ecosystem. Through a bonding mechanism, Redacted is an Olympus DAO fork built on the Ethereum blockchain that holds volatile assets like CRV (Curve DAO) and CVX (Convex Finance) in its treasury.

Name: Kyber Network Crystal Legacy
Description: The Kyber Network is a multichain crypto trading platform that allows liquidity from different sources to be connected to enable trades at the best rates.

Name: Yoshi.exchange
Description: Yoshi.Exchange is a decentralized exchange launched on the Fantom Opera blockchain. It is the first closed-cycle Fantom payment system. The main objective is to make Fantom a more appealing ecosystem to newcomers and to simplify the user experience for current users.

Name: RMRK
Description: The RMRK platform is a set of NFT building blocks which provide infinite extensibility, running on Kusama, Polkadot's canary network (An operational blockchain that has a limited supply of tokens to allow testing of features for a related main net), without the need for parachains or smart contracts.

Name: Divi
Description: The Divi project is a blockchain project dedicated to accelerating the adoption of digital currencies. In keeping with its slogan, "crypto made easy," Divi aims to make using cryptocurrencies a frictionless, simple experience, making digital assets more accessible to everyday consumers.

Name: Ark
Description: ARK is a cryptocurrency and blockchain-based platform that allows anyone to create a fully customizable and interoperable blockchain. ARK develops solutions based on blockchain technology to address the challenges of dealing with blockchain and to support a wide range of use cases.

Name: MaidSafeCoin
Description: MaidSafeCoin, a proxy token, supports the development of the SAFE Network and allows pre-purchasing of its native currency, Safe Network Tokens. The MaidSafeCoins can be swapped one-for-one with Safe Network Tokens after the network is complete. The MainSafeCoin can be purchased via both the Omni protocol (MAID) and the Ethereum ERC20 protocol (eMAID).

Name: Tomb Shares
Description: TOMB Shares (TSHARE) are one way to gauge the value of the TOMB Protocol and the trust of investors in its ability to maintain TOMB close to the peg. During epoch expansions, TOMB is minted and distributed proportionally to all TSHARE holders whose tokens have been staked in the Masonry (boardroom).

Name: Numeraire
Description: Numeraire is an Ethereum-based platform that enables developers and data scientists to create machine learning models that are more reliable. The platform's main goal is to bring decentralization to the data science field and create a competitive environment for developing effective machine learning prediction models.

Name: Bifrost
Description: The Bifrost platform is a multichain middleware platform that enables developers to develop decentralized applications (DApps) using a variety of protocols. Bifrost does not limit developers to using a single blockchain but allows them to combine the best protocols to develop considerably more scalable and flexible DApps.

Name: aelf
Description: ELF is a self-evolving decentralized cloud computing network. The ELF Blockchain platform provides high-efficiency multi-chain parallel-processing, cross-chain communication, and self-evolving governance to establish a Blockchain infrastructure for varied commercial requirements.

Name: Bezoge Earth
Description: Bezoge Earths offers a massive open-world sandbox game in which players can summon Bezogi characters from a variety of different breeds by minting NFTs, which randomly produce Bezogi from a large variety of different species. Bezoge Earth is designed to serve as an entry point into the crypto space for newcomers without high entry barriers and have a lot of fun while doing so.

Name: Alchemy Pay
Description: Alchemy Pay is the world's first payment gateway solution where fiat and crypto economies are combined within a single system. The Alchemy Pay platform also enables seamless access to crypto investments, blockchain technologies, and DeFi products configured to meet the needs of sophisticated veterans and those who are new to cryptocurrencies and blockchains

Name: Keep3rV1
Description: Keep3rV1 is a decentralized platform designed to facilitate coordination between projects requiring outside development services as well as those who can supply those services. Essentially, the project functions as a job board for facilitating communication between job posters, such as decentralized finance protocols, and job executors, otherwise known as Keepers.

Name: Coinmetro
Description: Coinmetro is known as a fully-rounded FinTech ecosystem, which aims to provide easy access to digital assets. XCM is the platform's native asset. Using Coinmetro, everyone has the opportunity to better their lives by accessing the same opportunities.

Name: Storj
Description: STORJ can be used by users to share data without requiring anyone to involve a third-party storage provider. STORJ does not censor or monitor any data it contains. STORJ is the first network to guarantee the security of user data through blockchain technology.

Name: League of Kingdoms
Description: League of Kingdoms is a free-to-play, blockchain-based MMO war strategy game. Unlike traditional RTS (Real-time strategy) games, League of Kingdoms relies on blockchain technology to power the game's core concepts. Ownership is central to the game's gameplay. Through NFT technology, you can own digital assets and trade them seamlessly in the game.

Name: Rari Governance Token
Description: The Rari Governance Token is the RGT. Members of the community with tokens can use it to propose and vote on proposals. In the future, users will also be able to delegate their voting power to another address in order to pool their votes.

Name: Mango
Description: Mango Markets aims to create a decentralized trading platform that is friendly to both traders and makers. Initial features will include on-chain margin trading on limit order books and perpetual futures, which are the main revenue generators for centralized exchanges.

Name: DUSK Network
Description: Dusk Network, created by a team in the Netherlands on July 4th, 2018, is an open-source, privacy-oriented blockchain that has grown out of years of academic work. Dusk Network aims to meet the needs and requirements of the financial markets. In order for the system to work, it must have a scalable public infrastructure, finality of settlements, and strict data privacy.

Name: Stratis
Description: Stratis is a blockchain-as-a-service platform that provides several products and services for enterprise users, including the ability to launch private sidechains, run full nodes, build and deploy smart contracts, and offer an ICO (Initial Coin Offering) platform. In addition to cryptocurrency wallets, it also provides blockchain consulting services. STRAX is the native token of Stratis, which is backed by its own blockchain.

Name: BENQI Liquid Staked AVAX
Description: The BENQI Liquid Staking protocol is the first liquid staking protocol for Avalanche. SAVAX is an interest-bearing version of AVAX that users stake with BENQI. In this way, users can earn rewards for both securing the Avalanche network and from the world of DeFi.

Name: Ankr Reward-Bearing Staked ETH
Description: As a synthetic derivative asset, aETH represents your Ethereum stake plus your stake rewards. You can redeem aETH tokens by staking your Ethereum with Ankr, which you can then keep for yourself, trade, or use to earn yield with Defi products.

Name: AscendEx Token
Description: With a core value of “Efficiency, Resiliency, and Transparency,” AscendEX is a global digital asset financial trading platform founded in 2018 by a group of Wall Street quantitative trading veterans.

Name: StarLink
Description: The STARL token is the currency for the first truly decentralized metaverse: 100% renounced, unlocked, and community-driven. STARL Metaverse Project is the first crypto project to bring on board a team with two decades of experience in AAA game design and development, including work for PlayStation, Disney, Lionsgate Entertainment, Lucasfilm, Pixar, and LEGO. STARL will serve as a bridge between the professional gaming industry and cryptocurrency.

Name: Sun Token
Description: SUN.io is TRON's first all-in-one platform that allows stablecoin trading, token mining, and self-government. As a multi-functional governance token on the SUN platform (similar to Curve DAO's CRV token and Ellipsis' EPS token), the new SUN token will give token holders various rights and benefits including voting rights, and value capture, rewards for staking, etc.

Name: NKN
Description: NKN, or New Kind of Network, is an open-source protocol for public peer-to-peer networks based on blockchains. Ultimately, the project aims to rebuild an Internet that is truly open, decentralized, dynamic, safe, shared, and owned by its community.

Name: Prometeus
Description: The Prometeus Network calls itself a secure and decentralized ecosystem designed to address real-world real-time data brokerage problems. Influencer Marketing, Medical, and Insurance data market industries were the target markets of this application. Prometeus Network is developed by Prometeus Labs, an organization of data scientists and entrepreneurs.

Name: Hathor
Description: The transactions of Hathor are arranged in a DAG, outside the blocks, and are confirmed by the blocks. Hathor is reportedly highly scalable and decentralized due to its design. The Hathor project aims to solve the difficulty of creating new tokens. The native HTR token operates with the same scalability and security parameters as tokens on the network.

Name: BTSE Token
Description: By providing an exchange utility token, BTSE will enhance the user experience on the exchange and within the ecosystem. In addition, the tokens offer Confidential Transactions and Confidential Assets to maximize on-chain privacy and are the first exchange token running on Liquid, a sidechain-based settlement platform for traders and exchanges.

Name: Dopex Rebate Token
Description: Rebates are calculated on the basis of the percentage losses incurred by option writers for an epoch, and a dividend is given to all option pool participants based on the percentage of RDPX that corresponds to those losses. By voting in the protocol, DPX holders determine what the rebate percentage will be.

Name: Orchid Protocol
Description: Orchid's virtual private network connects users to a pool of Internet service providers to create a decentralized private network (VPN). The Orchid project uses a new ERC-20 staking token called OXT, a new VPN protocol for token-incentivized bandwidth proxying, and algorithmic smart contracts with advertising and payment features.

Name: Hxro
Description: In MoonRekt, HXRO's first game offering, lets users play bitcoin price action in a five-minute multiplayer format. In an effort to attract users, the platform began accepting on-chain bitcoin payments. Using the Lightning Network, HXRO can now accept bitcoin payments instantly.

Name: Interest Bearing Bitcoin
Description: IBBTC (Interest Bearing Bitcoin) represents Bitcoin on Ethereum, Matic, and BSC with fully collateralized trades. In addition to providing users with a base interest rate for holding IBBTC, IBBTC aims to be the most liquid, secure, and widely used bitcoin-backed asset on DeFi.

Name: QuarkChain
Description: QuarkChain Network is a permissionless blockchain architecture designed to meet global standards in commercial transactions. It is a secure, decentralized, scalable blockchain solution aimed at supporting 100,000+ on-chain transactions per second.

Name: inSure DeFi
Description: A community-based crypto asset insurance ecosystem, inSure DeFi allows users to guarantee their crypto portfolios by buying SURE tokens with fiat and other cryptocurrencies. Using a Dynamic Pricing Model, ChainLink is leveraged to determine insurance premiums that are used to spread crypto ownership risks.

Name: Venus
Description: A synthetic stablecoin protocol and algorithmic money market, Venus is exclusive to Binance Smart Chain (BSC). With the protocol, users can borrow directly against collateral at high speed while paying less in transaction fees, enabling a simple-to-use loan and borrowing solution within the decentralized finance ecosystem (DeFi).

Name: Metadium
Description: The Metadium (META) platform aims to realize the idea of self-sovereign identity through an open-source, blockchain-based identity ecosystem. Metadium is said to also support the management of multiple aspects of an individual's digital identity, including authentication and personal information verification. By using Meta ID, Keepin by Metadium connects service providers and end-users.

Name: World Mobile Token
Description: World Mobile Token (WMT) is a digital token intended to reward members for participating in the network and providing a service. By offering WMT as an incentive to both token holders and node operators, the network will be able to reward holders who want to support the operation of the network via delegating their WMT stake to a node operator (holders).

Name: iExec RLC
Description: IExec is the world's top provider of decentralized computing based on blockchain technology. By using blockchain, people can monetize their computing power, applications, and datasets through a market network. The service allows users to access on-demand cloud computing resources. The IExec platform can be used for applications in fields such as big data, healthcare, artificial intelligence, rendering, and fintech.

Name: Victoria VR
Description: Victoria VR is a Blockchain-based VR MMORPG built on Unreal Engine with Realistic Graphics that is owned and created by its users. The whole world is designed to be a universal platform for all virtual realities, games, and decentralized applications, resulting in a shared virtual world or the 3D internet - the Metaverse.

Name: Polkastarter
Description: Polkastarter is a platform that provides a simple way to operate cross-chain token auctions and token pools. In addition to helping early-stage blockchain projects raise capital, it makes it easier for them to distribute their tokens. Polkastarter allows blockchain projects to easily set up their own cross-chain swap pools so they can raise funds in a secure manner. This, in turn, allows users to invest without risk since smart contracts automate swaps.

Name: TrueFi
Description: The TrueFi protocol enables liquid providers to create interest-bearing pools with a high APR. TrustTokens (TRU) provided by TrueFi are used for utility and reward mechanisms, which encourage participants to maintain stable, high APRs.

Name: Neutrino System Base Token
Description: The Neutrino Token (NSBT) entitles its holders to participate in decisions regarding the Neutrino protocol, product features and roadmap, and changes to governance parameters. In addition to functioning as a DeFi toolkit, Neutrino is an algorithmic price-stable assetization protocol. Using it, stablecoins can be created that are tied to specific real-world assets, such as national currencies or commodities

Name: Kishu Inu
Description: Kishu Inu (KISHU) is a cryptocurrency that uses the breed of dog Kishu as its mascot to differentiate it from other cryptocurrencies. It is no secret to KISHU's creators that Dogecoin (DOGE) was an inspiration for the project.

Name: BNB48 Club Token
Description: Originally released via airdrop, KogeCoin was a deflationary token that was available to all early QuickSwap users for approximately four weeks. KogeCoin holders will profit from the fees generated by KogeFarm.io, which is an auto-compounding utility designed exclusively for DeFi users.

Name: Railgun
Description: The Railgun smart contract system uses Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZK-SNARK) technology to provide privacy and security to cryptocurrency and decentralized applications users. By using Railgun, your wallet addresses will no longer appear in your transactions and actions on blockchains, where previously they were publicly accessible to everyone.

Name: Unibright
Description: Unibright is a cross-blockchain and cross-system business process integration launched in 2016. In order to make blockchain and contracts more accessible to mainstream users, Unibright offers a unified framework. The Unibright platform includes enterprise-level blockchain solutions, integration platforms, and an ecosystem that revolves around tokenized assets.

Name: STP Network
Description: Standard Tokenization Protocol defines how tokenized assets are issued and transferred while adhering to regulations. STP-Standard protocols include an on-chain validator, which enables tokens built on top of them to verify compliance with any jurisdictional or issuer-specific requirements. Standard Tokenization Protocol is intended to serve as the standard way for assets to be tokenized, making them fully transactable and compliant across jurisdictions.

Name: Steem
Description: Steem is a social blockchain that offers users immediate revenue streams by rewarding them for sharing content. At present, it's the only blockchain capable of powering real-world applications via social apps such as Steemit.

Name: Alien Worlds
Description: Alien Worlds is an NFT DeFi metaverse where players can compete and collaborate. In order to accomplish this, players are encouraged to compete for Trilium (TLM), which enables them to control competing Decentralized Autonomous Organizations ("Planet DAOs") and to access additional gameplay.

Name: Ellipsis
Description: Elipsis is a decentralized exchange that allows users to swap stablecoins on Binance Smart Chain with minimal fees and low slippage.

Name: Dero
Description: Dero is the first crypto project to combine a proof-of-work blockchain with an anonymous blockchain structure and DAG blocks. In comparison to existing privacy coins like Monero (XMR) or Z-Cash (ZEC), it is designed to offer a radical improvement. In order to achieve this, Dero intends to combine the best of both consensus mechanisms.

Name: JasmyCoin
Description: JasmyCoin is an ERC-20 token. JasmyCoin can also be used to prove value exchange or payment for services by an unspecified number of individuals and businesses. As the token's functionality is not limited, it can be used for a variety of purposes.

Name: Marlin
Description: Known as a DeFi/Web 3.0 network, the Marlin open protocol provides a high-performance programmable infrastructure. MarlinVM, run by the nodes in the Marlin network, called Metanodes, provides a virtual router interface for developers to perform edge computations and deploy customized overlays.

Name: Magic
Description: MAGIC is the governance token for Cosmic Universe, an MMORPG that uses the Harmony blockchain to develop a play-to-earn system. In Cosmos Universe, players have full ownership of their NFT characters, their own lands, and the play-to-earn concept is integrated into the entire environment.

Name: GXChain
Description: The GXChain blockchain is a fundamental technology for building a trusted, global data economy. GXChain benefits from DPoS-based Graphene underlying architecture. Furthermore, it possesses G-ID, GVM, BaaS, and Blockcity features, which are convenient for developers of applications. GXChain develops multiple data modules based on decentralization, cryptography, and smart token design.

Name: SingularityNET
Description: The SingularityNET platform is a full-stack AI solution powered by a decentralized protocol that allows AIs to work together at scale and eliminates one of the major obstacles to AI growth today - a lack of interoperability that severely limits individual AIs' abilities. Any individual can use SingularityNET to access a network of AI algorithms, services, and agents.

Name: Dawn Protocol
Description: Dawn is the new blockchain of the currently existing FirstBlood platform. The protocol is open-source and aimed at gaming and competitions. No matter which country or background users come from, its mission is to enable a fair, open, and rewarding gaming ecosystem. In order to reward players, game developers can seamlessly integrate the open protocol into their games.

Name: GPEX
Description: Through cross-chain compatibility and inter-chain technology, the GPEX wallet enables fast payment transfers to partner platforms. The GPEX Wallet allows users to transfer unused loyalty points, reward points, airline miles, store points, etc. (collectively, "Brand Points"). Additionally, the wallet supports other partner tokens for their games, as well as an internal stablecoin GPX.

Name: Qredo
Description: Qredo is reimagining ownership and connectivity of digital assets. By pioneering the first decentralized trustless multi-party computation (MPC) custodial network, Qredo is bringing liquidity and capital efficiency to the blockchain economy. In addition to decentralized custody and native cross-chain swaps, this advancement enables Qredo to offer cross-platform liquidity access.

Name: flexUSD
Description: The FlexUSD stablecoin is pegged to the US dollar. The currency pays holders interest automatically, making it unique among stablecoins.

Name: Proton
Description: XPR is a public blockchain platform and smart contract platform that combines consumer apps with peer-to-peer electronic payments. It emphasizes a high level of identification security and financial settlement.

Name: KardiaChain
Description: Kardiachain is a public blockchain platform focused on technologies, infrastructure, and solutions focused on enterprise and government applications in Vietnam and other countries in South & East Asia.

Name: Shiba Predator
Description: In the Shiba ecosystem, QOM is the Shiba Predator. It aims to flip the Shiba Market Cap. It is a decentralized, spontaneous experiment in community building.

Name: Strike
Description: Strike is a DeFi lending platform that allows users to deposit cryptocurrencies into one of several markets supported by the platform and earn interest on them. In return for a user's token deposit to a Strike market, the user receives STRK tokens.

Name: PlatON Network
Description: LatticeX Foundation created and operates PlatON, the next-generation Internet infrastructure protocol that is based on blockchain technology and supported by the privacy-preserving computation network. PlatON’s core feature is “Computing interoperability”.PlatON Network's native token is LAT, a cryptocurrency is based on the Ethereum platform.

Name: Decentral Games
Description: A 3D metaverse casino built in Decentraland, Decentral Games is the first-ever metaverse casino owned by its users. Through the play-to-earn metaverse poker game (ICE Poker) operated by Decentral Games, the DG Treasury receives revenue from NFT mints, royalties on secondary sales, activations, and upgrades.

Name: DODO
Description: Powered by Ethereum and Binance Smart Chain, DODO operates as a decentralized exchange platform. With high-capital-efficient liquidity pools, it supports the single-token provision, reduces impermanent losses, and minimizes slippage.

Name: Stargaze
Description: The Stargaze network is a decentralized and community-owned network. Using Tendermint as the consensus engine, it is built as an app-specific Cosmos Proof-of-Stake chain. The project aims to be similar to OpenSea, but with community control via a curation and protocol DAO.

Name: RSK Infrastructure Framework
Description: RIF (Rootstock Infrastructure Framework) is the third layer of Bitcoin-based infrastructure offering a wide range of features, such as payments, storage, and domaining (RNS). These services are provided by a tech stack, short for Blockchain Technology Stack, that requires the RIF token to access.

Name: AIOZ Network
Description: AIOZ Network (AIOZ) is an Ethereum token that allows Ethereum and Cosmos to operate together over Layer 1 blockchains. Aioz Network aims to enable instant execution and low transaction fees for applications such as file storage, live streaming, content delivery, etc.

Name: FEG Token BSC
Description: FEG token BSC offers a multi-chain exchange for all. With one interface, many features can be accessed, including trading, wrapping, staking, and lending.

Name: Wilder World
Description: Powered entirely by NFTs, Wilder World is an immersive 3D universe. Wilder World aims to create a virtual world where users can roam freely, obtain virtual land, and purchase unique NFTs through a collaboration with Zero.Space.

Name: Everipedia
Description: IQ Network from Everypedia is the first encyclopedia in the world where anyone can become a member and receive rewards and accolades for curating. Everipedia has a vision of bringing blockchain knowledge to the world and bringing information to the blockchain, validating facts in an era of misinformation, and unlocking a new class of use cases for the blockchain space.

Name: Wrapped Centrifuge
Description: WCFG (Wrapped Centrifuge) is an Ethereum token that represents CFG (Centrifuge) on the Ethereum blockchain. WCFG is not CFG, but a separate ERC-20 token created to track the price of CFG.

Name: BTC Standard Hashrate Token
Description: Binance Smart Chain (BSC) launched the Bitcoin Standard Hashrate Token (BTCST). The collateral is Bitcoin (BTC) hashrate, with each token representing 0.1 TH/s of Bitcoin mining power at 60 W/TH efficiencies. In exchange for freshly minted BTCST tokens, miners provide their computational power to the platform. Ultimately, BTCST’s goal is to connect liquidity and Bitcoin’s mining market.

Name: DEAPCOIN
Description: DEA Project, a blockchain-based NFT DeFi platform featuring NFTs, games, and other forms of entertainment, is being developed by Digital Entertainment Asset limited, headquartered in Singapore. In the NFT Marketplace, DEP can use DEAPcoin, the ERC-20 utility token for DEP, to purchase NFTs (ERC-721) in order to enhance gameplay.

Name: Iron Bank EURO
Description: CREAM's Iron Bank serves as the protocol-to-protocol lending platform and liquidity back end for the entire DeFi ecosystem. Currently, peer-to-peer money markets such as Cream v1 are available.

Name: Aavegotchi
Description: As a non-fungible token (NFT) built on the Aave protocol, Aavegotchi (GHST) is a DeFi-oriented project. Essentially, Aavegotchis are game avatars that can be staked to earn rewards as DeFi collateral.

Name: Sperax
Description: Software products based on the Sperax protocol are developed by Sperax, an open-source group. The Sperax stablecoin (SPA) and a suite of DeFi apps are all built on top of Sperax token (SPA). With its original BDLS consensus protocol and dual stablecoin system, Sperax aims to offer decentralized financial services to everyone.

Name: Orion Protocol
Description: A decentralized platform that aggregates liquidity from multiple crypto exchanges, the Orion Protocol provides a single point of entry into the entire digital asset market without requiring custodial access. Unlike most crypto exchanges, Orion is designed to solve the problem of profitable transactions being difficult due to a lack of liquidity.

Name: Adshares
Description: Advertising space in the Metaverse is monetized by AdShares, a Web3 protocol. Metaverse, blockchain games, NFT exhibitions, and website advertising are all available on AdShares’ platforms. It provides low rates, 100000 transfers per second, and a revenue-sharing model among token holders.

Name: Alchemix
Description: A DeFi protocol known as Alchemix allows depositors to create synthetic tokens which can represent the future yield of a deposit. With Alchemix,  in exchange for temporary deposits of stablecoins, users can retrieve a near-instant tokenized value.

Name: My Neighbor Alice
Description: The game My Neighbor Alice uses blockchain technology to allow players to create and own virtual islands, build items, and meet new people. As part of the traditional gaming market, My Neighbor Alice aims to introduce blockchain technology to millions of players.

Name: Beldex
Description: BChat, BelNet, the Beldex browser, the Beldex privacy protocol, and the Beldex bridge are among the privacy-first decentralized applications that make up the Beldex ecosystem. BDX, the privacy coin of Beldex, is a utility that enables privacy preservation in decentralized applications.

Name: FUNToken
Description: As an online gaming operator and player, FunFair offers blockchain-powered solutions that are increasingly relevant to both. Using Ethereum technology, FunFair provides low-cost, high-quality, transparent, and provably fair online casino experiences.

Name: Kirobo
Description: Kirobo is a start-up from Israel whose sole purpose is to create a logic layer that sits on top of every blockchain and protects users from human errors. The ultimate goal of Kirobo is to make blockchain as user-friendly and secure as internet banking.

Name: Spookyswap
Description: In the Fantom Opera network, SpookySwap is a decentralized exchange (DEX) for automated market-making. In contrast to other exchanges, SpookySwap is focused on building a solid foundation by utilizing BOO tokens for governance, diverse farms, a built-in bridge, and limit orders.

Name: TomoChain
Description: Using Proof-of-Stake Voting consensus, Tomochain is a scalable blockchain used commercially by companies worldwide. By using technology to mask the friction of Blockchain, they aim to accelerate onboarding for millions of users while keeping its underlying benefits.

Name: Seedify.fund
Description: Seedify.fund (SFUND) is an incubator and launchpad for blockchain gaming that provides fund-raising, community and partnership building, and full support to help drive the future of gaming. Seedify NFT Space is the industry's first NFT marketplace centered on gaming and metaverse assets. The platform also includes an NFT launchpad for game assets and metaverse assets.

Name: KILT Protocol
Description: KILT is a decentralized blockchain identity protocol designed to facilitate the issue of verified, revocable, and anonymous claims-based credentials with Web 3.0. The mission of KILT is to help people regain control over their data, restore their privacy, and let them implement innovative business models around credentials and identity.

Name: Utrust
Description: Utrust offers instant transactions and immediate crypto-to-cash settlements to merchants through their digital currency payment solution with the same name, which helps modernize the finance and payment industry.

Name: FEG Token
Description: Decentralized finance is being restructured by FEG. FEG is reshaping and enhancing DeFi's most extensively needed advancements through developing the most robust ecosystem ever built for the DeFi platform.

Name: Hoo Token
Description: The Hoo Token is the platform pass of Hoo, abbreviated as HOO, and is a decentralized blockchain digital pass that is based on Hoo Smart Chain (HSC) and Ethereum. Hoo has created a development path that combines DEX+CEX with Hoo characteristics. In addition to being the only shared asset of the entire platform ecology, HOO is also the most important link for realizing capital flows and governance mechanisms.

Name: Metal
Description: The Metal (MTL) currency is the native currency of Metal products, a crucial component of the Metal ecosystem. Using Metal Pay, you can instantly send and receive any cryptocurrency to friends. With MTL, cryptocurrency payments are fast and easy, and there are no fees to send, receive, buy, or sell.

Name: Verasity
Description: Video-sharing platform Verasity (VRA) aims to create a fair system for creators to be paid for their work as well as advertisers to gain value for their ad spend. Verasity achieves this through its proof-of-value (PoV) protocol, product layers, and its esportfightclub.com platform - a pro-gaming streaming platform specifically designed to play host to esports tournaments such as PUBG Mobile, Verasity's biggest use case.

Name: Wonderland
Description: The Olympus DAO fork Wonderland is one of the most popular and successful forks. On Avalanche, it was the first protocol of decentralized reserve currencies. Unlike Magic Internet Money and liquidity tokens, TIME is backed by a variety of reserve assets.

Name: district0x
Description: The district0x Network has decentralized autonomous organizations - districts - that act as marketplaces and communities. Every internet citizen will be able to connect to and deploy districts on the network without charge for the rest of their lives.

Name: Beefy.Finance
Description: The Beefy.Finance platform enables users to earn compound interest on their crypto holdings by creating a proprietary, decentralized, multi-chain yield optimization algorithm. In the DeFi ecosystem, Beefy.Finance optimizes user rewards by automatically implementing a set of investment strategies backed by smart contracts for liquidity pools, automated market making, and other yield farming opportunities.

Name: Veritaseum
Description: Veritaseum tokens enable financial transactions and trades without the involvement of third parties. As an ERC20 token, VERI tokens utilize the Ethereum platform and are exposed to a range of other crypto assets.

Name: Electroneum
Description: The main purpose of cryptocurrency Electronium is to make it easier for users to use and accessible to a large audience. Mobile applications and mobile phones are used to develop the project, in which users can mine digital money and invest it for themselves.

Name: Covalent
Description: Across all blockchain networks, Covalent provides a unified API for full visibility and transparency of assets. With just a few lines of code, it allows you to get detailed, granular blockchain transaction data from multiple blockchains.

Name: Dvision Network
Description: Along with being a blockchain-based, virtual reality content ecosystem, Dvision Network also powers the NFT marketplace within it. Humanity can enjoy an affluent life in a virtual reality world in the fourth industrial revolution presented by Dvision Network. Dvision has 3 important platform pillars, an NFT marketplace (VR-Market), Tailored Virtual Reality (VR-Space), and Collection of VR-Spaces (VR-City).

Name: ZoidPay
Description: In addition to being a crypto liquidity platform, ZoidPay also enables instant card issuance for web 3.0 financial services. Using Zoidpay, you can shop anything with your digital assets from anywhere in the world.

Name: Bitcoin Diamond
Description: BCD (Bitcoin Diamond) is a hard fork of Bitcoin. During block height 495866, a fork was implemented that introduced a new proof of work algorithm to decrease the likelihood of attacks on the network, as well as segregation of signatures for transactions on the chain to increase the number of transactions per second on the network.

Name: Bounce
Description: A decentralized auction platform, Bounce integrates liquidity mining, decentralized governance, and stake mechanisms. A key principle of Bounce is the scarcity of resources, which creates an environment of competition for resources. In Bounce, tokens and other assets like NFTs are provided in a competitive environment.

Name: JPEG'd
Description: JPEG'd is a protocol that will be used in the NFT space for music royalties and albums in the future. Unlike other governance tokens, JPEG has no economic value. It serves solely as a utility token for protocol governance.

Name: Bitrue Coin
Description: The native asset of the Bitrue Exchange is Bitrue Coin (BTR). With BTR, Bitrue is able to support all of its current business models, including trading fee deductions, cash deposits by projects, voting for listings, wealth management programs, and loan programs.

Name: CertiK
Description: CTK is primarily used as a utility token. Therefore, it powers the CertiK ecosystem in a very important way. For instance, users of the platform can use the token to make payments and settle their accounts.

Name: XMON
Description: XMON's native token is XMON. XMON is a blockchain-based project that uses artificial intelligence to create pixel horror.

Name: cUNI
Description: The CUNI token is the native token of the Compound protocol. It is a disaggregated interest rate protocol that will enable developers to enjoy a world of open financial applications. The Compound protocol aims to revolutionize access to credit.

Name: DEI Token
Description: With one native bridge that connects all chains within the DEUS ecosystem, DEI is an advanced algorithmic cross-chain fractional reserve stablecoin. The mission of DEI is to bridge liquidity across all blockchains in a decentralized and scalable manner. Using DEI, users will be able to send stablecoins to any chain and claim them on the other side.

Name: Kava Swap
Description: Kava Swap™ is a decentralized cross-chain Autonomous Market Making (AMM) protocol for natively exchanging assets between the largest assets in the world. In addition to low fees and high efficiency, Kava Swap™ provides strong returns for liquidity providers.

Name: IDEX
Description: IDEX is a hybrid liquidity depository exchange (DEX) combining an order book and an automated market maker. This hybrid model combines the performance, security, and liquidity of AMMs with the benefits of traditional order book models.

Name: Karura
Description: Karura is an EVM-compatible, scalable, and DeFi-optimized network founded by the Acala Foundation. Among the platform's offerings are a staking derivative (liquid KSM), a stablecoin backed by cross-chain assets (kUSD), and an AMM DEX - all with micro gas fees that can be paid in any token.

Name: Augur
Description: Built on blockchain technology, Augur is a decentralized prediction market platform. Through Augur (REP), owners of the Ethereum-based Reputation token can harness the wisdom of the crowd through prediction markets. A user can, according to these markets, make bets on the outcome of events such as company performance, election results, or even natural phenomena by buying shares that bet either on or against the proposed outcomes.

Name: Adventure Gold
Description: Adventure Gold (AGLD) is an ERC-20 native token included in Loot non-fungible tokens (NFT) project. In Loot, randomized adventures gear is generated and stored in the blockchain.

Name: Clover Finance
Description: Clover Finance (CLV) is a blockchain infrastructure platform built on Polkadot for DeFi applications which aims to be cross-chain and cross-chain compatible. Clover Finance transactions are financed with the CLV token, and network upgrades are voted on with it. In addition to enabling interoperability between Bitcoin and other blockchains, Clover Finance envisions reducing friction between the two.

Name: Aave [OLD]
Description: Aave is a decentralized finance protocol that lets people lend and borrow crypto. Digital assets are deposited into special liquidity pools where lenders earn interest. Through this liquidity, crypto can then be used as collateral for flash loans. LEND is an Ethereum-based token on Aave which provides discounts on deployment fees, holders of LEND receive discounted fees on the platform, and it serves as a governance token.

Name: Wanchain
Description: The Wanchain distributed ledger enables cross-chain transactions and multi-chain interoperability. Wanchain facilitates transactions between blockchains, but it also runs autonomously as a standalone blockchain. Transactions between chains are recorded and processed with the protocol acting as a distributed ledger.

Name: HUNT
Description: In order to empower users of the HUNT DAPP, the HUNT token serves as the key currency. It can be used directly in every DApp, or it can be used as a vehicle token to carry out different functions.

Name: Hermez Network
Description: Hermez is a decentralized ZK-rollup designed to scale payments and token transfers on the Ethereum network to greatly reduce transaction costs and support community projects through its Proof-of-Donation mechanism.

Name: Regen
Description: The Regen Network Platform token is REGEN coin. Managing regenerative landscapes in harmony with ecosystems and economics is at the heart of Regen Network's approach.

Name: Ion
Description: ION is an open, public, permissionless Layer 2 Decentralized Identifier network built on top of the Bitcoin blockchain.

Name: Badger DAO
Description: In order to bring Bitcoin into Ethereum, Badger DAO aims to create an ecosystem of DeFi products. Unlike previous DeFi projects that used Ethereum as the main reserve asset, this is the first project to use BTC. As part of the launch, Sett and DIGG will be the main products.

Name: ThunderCore
Description: Public blockchain ThunderCore is a secure, high-performing, EVM-compatible, and cross-chain interoperable. The platform enables decentralized applications to create an even more hyperconnected world.

Name: BENQI
Description: Avalanche-based BENQI is a decentralized, non-custodial liquidity market protocol. In addition to lending, borrowing, and earning interest with digital assets, the protocol allows users to exchange assets seamlessly. While depositors provide liquidity for the protocol, borrowers are able to borrow in over-collateralized ways.

Name: Bonfida
Description: Bonfida is a comprehensive suite of products that bridges the gap between Serum and Solana. Serum GUI is the flagship of Solana's Data Analytics and brings its first-of-its-kind technology to the field.

Name: Sifchain
Description: Sifchain is a solution for DEXes that combines multiple chains. Sifchain is aiming for greater performance, enhanced cryptoeconomics for trading and security, and an extensible roadmap for Omni-chain, as well as true DAO governance in the future.

Name: Phantasma
Description: Phantasma is an open-source, decentralized blockchain platform with a rich set of features. This innovative project boasts an advanced eco-friendly smartNFT technology, dual token system, sustainable tokenomics model, and innovative staking mechanism. Chains such as this one are designed for the creation of digital goods and services, including communications, entertainment, marketplaces, and on-chain storage solutions for dApp developers and enterprise clients.

Name: Cult DAO
Description: The CULT token is tradable and liquid, and CULT transactions contribute to the CULT DAO protocol by funding investments into decentralized technologies by filling the treasury slowly.

Name: AllianceBlock
Description: The AllianceBlock Protocol is a decentralized, blockchain-agnostic layer 2 that automates the conversion of any digital or crypto asset into a bankable financial product by bridging traditional and decentralized finance.

Name: SafePal
Description: SafePal is dedicated to providing its users with a simple, secure, and convenient crypto management platform to store and grow their crypto assets. As the first hardware wallet invested and backed by Binance, SafePal is readily available for use. SafePal Token is a utility token that powers the entire SafePal ecosystem, which is short for SafePal Token.

Name: Gitcoin
Description: The Gitcoin community refers to itself as a community of builders, creators, and protocols joined together to develop the open internet's future. Gitcoin fosters the development of open-source projects by providing infrastructure for Web3 development - including tools, technologies, and networks.

Name: Automata
Description: Automata is a high-performance computing protocol that provides privacy-first, high assurance, and frictionless transactions for Web 3.0 applications and businesses. A seamless Web 3.0 experience is its mission, so it provides the functionalities and infrastructure needed to make it happen. It focuses on censorship, a lack of transparency in data ownership, and invasion of privacy.

Name: Blox
Description: Blox is an all-in-one support tool for crypto bookkeeping, accounting, auditing, and documentation. It is simple, automated, and efficient.

Name: Gains Farm
Description: Gain Farm combines yield farming with leveraged NFTs trading on a decentralized finance network (DeFi). In the Gain Farm ecosystem, the GFARM2 token is the native cryptocurrency.

Name: Wrapped NXM
Description: WNXM represents wrapped NXM tokens, which are freely tradable, and can be accessed only by Nexus Mutual members who have been KYC-ed. Tokens issued by Nexus Mutual are membership tokens of the mutual, a blockchain-based exchange where Smart Contract Cover can be purchased.

Name: Syntropy
Description: The NOIA was originally conceived as a Decentralized P2P Distributed Content Delivery Network (CDN). Funded by institutional investors, the company assembled a team of world-class engineers, experts, and advisors, and developed the first Open Source technology of its kind - the NOIA Cache.

Name: cBAT
Description: The Compound Basic Attention Token (cBAT) is one of the Compound Protocol Tokens. Developed for developers, the algorithmic, autonomous interest rate protocol Compound unlocks a universe of open financial applications.

Name: Aergo
Description: The Aero Blockchain Platform describes itself as an open-source enterprise blockchain platform optimized for hybrid deployments, which combine permissioned and permissionless blockchain architectures. With it, developers can handle data easily and create smart contracts in a familiar language using SQL.

Name: Aurory
Description: Aurory is an online role-playing game with a retro-futuristic setting, built on the Solana blockchain. In-game skins, unique and legendary cards, and power-ups can be won by staking NFTs earned by defeating monsters. You can later use these items against other players or trade them on the native marketplace.

Name: Avalaunch
Description: As the first decentralized fundraising protocol exclusively for the Avalanche ecosystem, Avalaunch provides promising and innovative projects with a fast, secure, and efficient platform for raising funds.

Name: Index Coop - ETH 2x Flexible Leverage Index
Description: By abstracting the management of a collateralized debt position into a simple index, the Ethereum Flexible Leverage Index makes it possible to leverage a collateralized debt position in a safe and efficient way. Participants could engage in leveraged lending while minimizing transaction costs and risks associated with collateralized debt.

Name: KeeperDAO
Description: With KeeperDAO, participants in keeper strategies such as liquidations, rebalance, and arbitrage can be strategically rewarded economically by pooled participation in trading, exchange, and lending applications. In addition to proposing and voting on all protocol upgrades, ROOK allows token holders to administrate the profit-sharing among holders and LPs, and to propose new systems.

Name: MAPS
Description: MAPS token holders and app users benefit from a reward system. As a result, they stand to gain from personalized and privacy-preserving promotions, helping the application cultivate its user base on a long-term basis. Besides being a medium of exchange on the platform, this token can also be used as a means of payment.

Name: Decentral Games Governance
Description: By aligning incentives, controlling assets, and delegating yield-bearing metaverse assets, Decentral Games builds free, play-to-earn games in the metaverse that empower players with a sense of economic freedom. In addition to earning revenue from NFT mints, secondary sale royalties, activations, and upgrades, Decentral Games' metaverse poker game (ICE Poker) earns revenue for the DG Treasury.

Name: Hydra
Description: The Hydro blockchain is an open-source Proof-of-Stake that has a unique economic mechanism. Its economy is unique in that it utilizes both inflationary and deflationary mechanisms simultaneously, and lets real adoption determine the total offering.

Name: DeFi Pulse Index
Description: Digital asset indexes for the Decentralized Finance industry, such as DeFi Pulse, measure tokens' performance. Tokens are weighted according to their circulating supply value.

Name: Klima DAO
Description: Klima DAO is a decentralized autonomous organization that aims to disrupt the emissions market by raising the cost of carbon emissions. Klima DAO aims to motivate companies to reduce emissions by speeding up the price growth of carbon assets.

Name: Swarm
Description: The Swarm network creates a decentralized storage and communication service by networking peer-to-peer nodes. Powered by the BZZ token and enforced by smart contracts on the Ethereum blockchain, the system is economically self-sustaining.

Name: PEAKDEFI
Description: PeakDEFI is a decentralized asset management fund that helps investors and asset managers connect.

Name: Vectorspace AI
Description: Vectorspace AI offers alternative datasets and a 'feature engineering' platform in addition to machine learning and financial informatics. Researchers who use patent-protected NLP/NLU can accelerate their data-driven innovation and discoveries with Vectorspace AI's correlation matrix datasets.

Name: Saito
Description: Blockchain applications can be run directly in your browser with Saito, a Web3 Foundation grant recipient. Instead of passing infrastructure costs to predatory monopolies like Infura, the network pays ISPs instead of miners and stakers.

Name: Hifi Finance
Description: A Lending Protocol known as Hifi (formerly Mainframe) allows anyone to borrow against their crypto. In HiFi, an on-chain obligation is represented as a bond-like instrument, which settles at a future date.

Name: Carry
Description: The Carry Protocol uses the CRE (pronounced "carry") as its main token. As a currency, Carry is used by consumers to pay merchants within the Carry ecosystem. They can also create customized smart contracts that earn Carry for the merchant.

Name: Alethea Artificial Liquid Intelligence Token
Description: Alethea AI is creating a metaverse inhabited by interactive and intelligent NFTs (iNFTs) using a decentralized protocol. As the founders of the iNFT standard, Alethea AI focuses on embedding AI animation, generative algorithms, and interaction into NFTs.

Name: ShapeShift FOX Token
Description: The ShapeShift platform is a borderless, cross-chain crypto trading platform that allows users to manage their own portfolios. The platform allows users to buy, send, receive, swap, and manage assets through an interface on their mobile device or web browser, and they can choose between a range of software or hardware wallets, including ShapeShift native, Portis, KeepKey, Trezor, and Ledger.

Name: agEUR
Description: The Angle protocol is a decentralized, capital-efficient, and overcollateralized stablecoin. The stablecoins (agTokens) can be minted and burnt in a 1:1 proportion to the cryptocurrency assets accepted as collateral.

Name: IRISnet
Description: IRISnet is the foundation for next-generation DApps. The IRIS Hub is built on Cosmos-SDK and provides modules that support DeFi interoperability. IRIS is an initiative for creating trustworthy, distributed business applications and an interchain service infrastructure.

Name: SuperRare
Description: The SuperRare NFT platform lets artists' works be hand-picked, approved, and printed on shared smart contracts. The platform provides web-scale curation, independent running of storefronts on the platform, and sovereign minting contracts that give artists the right to mint, promote, and sell their works directly to collectors.

Name: Travala.com
Description: Binance-backed Travala is the world-leading travel booking platform. Travala's native token, AVA powers The Customer Loyalty Program (Smart Program), Standard Booking Givebacks, Best Price Guarantee, Referral Program, Affiliate Program, and more.

Name: c0x
Description: The Compound 0x protocol is an algorithmic, autonomous interest rate protocol created for developers and to unlock the potential of open financial applications.

Name: Verus Coin
Description: Verus Coin is a zero-knowledge technology (a mechanism for verifying data, such as transactions and personal information or identification, without giving up control of the information); the project also works to offer Public Blockchains as a Service (PBaaS). Verus Coin uses a new consensus algorithm called Proof of Power, which is a 50/50 PoW/PoS system designed to fix the weaknesses in other PoS systems.

Name: Enzyme
Description: Through its MLN token, Enzyme allows users to choose investment strategies of their choice - from discretionary to Robo to ETFs to market-making. Security is the top priority for Enzyme. Enzyme's second-generation smart contract platform is thoroughly tested and audited before it is deployed on the mainnet.

Name: Propy
Description: Using blockchain technology, Propy is the first international real estate marketplace. By introducing a fully decentralized marketplace, Propy hopes to solve a number of problems in the real estate industry, such as delayed communication and repetition.

Name: Quickswap
Description: A permissionless decentralized exchange (DEX) built on Ethereum and utilizing Matic Network's Layer 2 scalability infrastructure, QuickSwap is a transparent and decentralized platform.

Name: Ampleforth
Description: Ethereum-based Ampleforth has an algorithmically controlled circulating supply. Ampleforth is designed to serve as the basis for the new decentralized economy by providing an asset that cannot be diluted by supply inflation and remains separated from the price action of other cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin (BTC).

Name: RedFOX Labs
Description: RFOX aims to be the global leader in immersive experiences focused on retail, media, gaming, and rewards on the 3D online universe called metaverse. The RFOX token is available on Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain, and WAX with more chain integrations coming in future updates.

Name: Boson Protocol
Description: Developed for electronic commerce transactions, BOSON Protocol is a decentralized infrastructure. Utilizing tokenized futures contracts, the BOSON ecosystem enables the exchange of digital value for real-world products and services.

Name: Efforce
Description: Efforce is a decentralized energy efficiency platform with WOZX as the native cryptocurrency token. The principal aim of Efforce is to introduce democratic principles to the energy efficiency industry, which still suffers from early setbacks with financing and global outreach. The WOZX tokens are used as the medium for tokenizing energy savings generated on the Efforce platform and making them usable by anyone.

Name: RIZON
Description: Based on Tindermint, RIZON Blockchain is a digital currency and asset hub blockchain built by Hdac Technology. RIZON aims to provide a platform for secure, interoperable and authenticated fiat currency issuance around the world via the Cosmos IBC(Inter-blockchain communication) module.

Name: DFI.money
Description: DFI.money (YFII) is a fork of the popular decentralized finance (DeFi) aggregator platform yearn.finance (YFI). DFI.money's native token is YFII, which is a fixed-supply token earned by liquidity providers as a result of their interaction with the network.YFII also plays the role of the governance token for the DFI.money community.

Name: Pylon Protocol
Description: Pylon Protocol is a decentralized finance (DeFi) framework for yield-based, principal-protected products and services. Terraform Labs (TFL) developed Pylon, an incentive payment system built on the Terra blockchain, to deliver long-term alignment between users and service providers where payments are rendered in cash flow rather than upfront.

Name: Alpaca Finance
Description: Alpaca Finance is the largest lending protocol on Binance Smart Chain for leveraged yield farming. Using it, lenders earn stable and safe returns on their investments, and lenders offer undercollateralized loans to borrowers so they can take advantage of leveraged yield farming positions, vastly increasing their profits.

Name: Linear
Description: The Linear protocol defines itself as unlimited in terms of liquidity and allows the creation of synthetic assets. LINA is the native cryptocurrency of the Linear protocol. LINA coin provides the opportunity for extra coins to be earned in the interest yield type in the DeFi protocol, which is used exclusively during the staking and lending phases.

Name: ARPA Chain
Description: Enabled by Multi-Party Computation (MPC), blockchain-based ARPA is a layer 2 solution for privacy-preserving computation. ARPA aims to separate data utility from ownership and enable data renting. The ARPA MPC protocol enables multiple entities to analyze data collaboratively and extract data synergies while maintaining the confidentiality and security of each party's data input.

Name: Uquid Coin
Description: Based on the popular Ethereum’s ERC20 Token, UQC is a decentralized virtual currency. UQC aims to supplement the development of the UQUID Ecosystem. Using UQC, token holders can instantly and effortlessly cash out their tokens.

Name: Handshake
Description: Handshake is a permissionless decentralized system intended to encourage distributed networks of computers to operate a domain name registration system. Handshake aims to provide an alternative to existing certificate authorities and naming systems by having each peer verify and manage the root DNS naming zone.

Name: Tornado Cash
Description: Ethereum-based Tornado Cash is a decentralized, non-custodial privacy solution. By breaking the on-chain link between the recipient and destination addresses, it improves the privacy of transactions. Tornado Cash utilizes smart contracts that exclusively accept ETH and ERC-20 deposits.

Name: Nerve Finance
Description: The Nerve automated market maker (AMM) provides traders access to Binance's Smart Chain for trading stablecoins and pegged assets. Nerve's first pool launches with USDT, USDC, and BUSD, three dollar-pegged stablecoins.

Name: Haven
Description: The Haven network uses XHV as its base currency. Haven is a Proof-of-Work (PoW) cryptocurrency powered by the CryptoNote protocol with a two minutes block time. Haven is based on Monero, which focuses on security, privacy, and untraceable transactions.

Name: Flamingo Finance
Description: Developed on the Neo blockchain, Flamingo is an interoperable, decentralized full-stack finance protocol. Amongst Flamingo’s five main components are Wrapper - a cross-chain asset gateway, Swap - a liquidity provider that operates on-chain, Vault - an asset manager, and  Perp - an AMM-based contract trading platform that runs indefinitely, and also DAO - a decentralized governance mechanism.

Name: Circuits of Value
Description: The Ethereum-based token Circuits of Value, also called COVAL, powers Emblem, a platform where users can create and personally combine ETH, ERC-20, and NFT tokens into a single, tradable token collectively called a Vault. Liquidity providers are rewarded with the ownership of COVAL, which can be used to create Vaults.

Name: LTO Network
Description: Liquid Task Orchestration, or LTO for short, utilizes its hybrid (2-layer) approach and allows enterprises and governments to maintain compliance with GDPR and retain data privacy while orchestrating inter-organizational workflows in a decentralized way.

Name: Ethernity Chain
Description: Ethernity is a platform based on blockchain technology that helps users take advantage of the rising popularity of non-fungible tokens (NFTs). Ethernity is a decentralized finance (DeFi) crossover project with verified NFTs. All NFTs can be traded on-chain using In the Ethernity ecosystem.

Name: Shiden Network
Description: Kusama-based Shiden Network is a multi-chain decentralized application layer. Kusama Network uses Shiden Network as a smart contract layer. Ethereum Virtual Machine, WebAssembly, and Layer2 solutions are all supported on the Shiden Network. Furthermore, the platform supports various applications like DeFi, and NFTs, amongst others.

Name: cVault.finance
Description: The cVault.finance token is the first high yield deflationary token that can be farmed. Users of CORE's ecosystem can earn rewards from a growing number of strategies by providing liquidity to one of three liquidity pools. The liquidity pools provided by CORE are Ethereum, Bitcoin, and DAI.

Name: DEUS Finance
Description: DEUS Finance Evolution is a marketplace that offers decentralized financial services. DEUS Finance specializes in ​providing the infrastructure for others to build financial instruments, such as synthetic stock trading platforms and futures trading, amongst others.

Name: Netvrk
Description: Blockchain-based Netvrk is a metaverse with tools that allow users to play-to-earn using NFTs and Virtual Land.

Name: SERO
Description: SERO is a platform that protects the privacy of Decentralized Applications (DApps). SERO aims to become the next-generation privacy blockchain that integrates smart contracts while enabling not only the issuance of privacy coins but also anonymous assets.

Name: ShareToken
Description: Ultilizing the ShareRing platform, ShareToken is a utility token that is used to make payments for sharing services across industries and geographies. The ShareRing platform includes the ShareRing application, ShareRing shop, and each ShareRing user’s ID. Aside from being used as payment for transaction fees on the ShareRing network, SHR tokens can also be staked to earn rewards.

Name: Onston
Description: Onston builds a 3D virtual world by linking VR/AR devices to the ONVERSE Platform and ONVERSE Marketplace, an advanced virtual reality metaverse ecosystem that uses blockchain technology.

Name: GuildFi
Description: GuildFi is a Web 3 platform developed to connect players, games, and investors in order to build a community of people who are interested in Play-to-earn games (GameFi) and preparing to enter the Metaverse. GuildFi aims to remove barriers to entry into GameFi by offering scholarships for players interested in GameFi, creating tools for analysis and maximizing earning, and being a learning hub for players interested in GameFi and the Metaverse.

Name: Phala Network
Description: Phala Network is a protocol for preserving data for privacy purposes, as well as data protection and blockchain smart contracts. Amongst many uses of PHA, the native utility token of the platform, are buying trusted computing resources, governance of the community, staking, and paying transaction fees.

Name: QANplatform
Description: QANplatform (QANX) is the hybrid blockchain platform that is both resistant to cryptanalytic attacks by a quantum computer and also enables developers and enterprises to rapidly build software applications like DApps or DeFi as well as run business processes on the blockchain.

Name: Gains Network
Description: Gains Network is a decentralized leverage trading platform that allows users to predict the rise and fall of an asset, it also corrects predictions that ultimately lead to profits. With Gains Network, users get an optimized suite of advanced tools and DeFi technologies that will help you create the most comprehensive, global decentralized finance ecosystem.

Name: Oxygen
Description: Built on top of Solana's network and powered by the Serum’s on-chain infrastructure, Oxygen is a non-custodial, decentralized protocol. The protocol offers lending and borrowing, fund transfers, and token exchanges, among other services.

Name: Samoyedcoin
Description: SAMO is a rising digital asset that supports a community that prioritizes integrating Solana users, educating market participants, making personal connections, and assisting one another in navigating life. SAMO is the fastest, most efficient, and most eco-friendly dog coin, it aspires to be Solana's Ambassador.

Name: Tranchess
Description: Tranchess (CHESS) is a yield-enhancing asset tracker which offers a variety of risk-return solutions.
