Also known as Token Queen, the main fund tracks an underlying asset and can be split equally into two sub-funds. BTC is chosen specifically as the first asset to be tracked by Transchess.

Name: BitShares
Description: Blockchain-based financial platform BitShares provides financial services. Using industry-grade blockchain technology, BitShares Blockchain is ideal for businesses, organizations, or individuals, with a free-market economy and ecosystem.

Name: OpenDAO
Description: OpenDAO is a digital community with the main goal of leveling the playing field for both creators and collectors. In it, the SOS token is created as a tribute to content creators and content collectors alike for their contributions to the entire NFT ecosystem.

Name: Kin
Description: Kin is a decentralized cryptocurrency created to be intuitively used in both the Mobile platform and Web apps. Kin rewards developers for their increased usage with a built-in incentive model. The Kin app platform pays developers for creating engaging cryptocurrency-based user experiences, resulting in greater engagement and shared economic benefits for users and developers.

Name: EverRise
Description: EverRise is a blockchain technology company whose mission is to increase accessibility to decentralized finance by introducing security solutions. EverRise provides investors and developers the tools to access the widest, most secured possible market by utilizing a creative ecosystem of DApps. Powered by the EverRise DApps ecosystem, the EverRise token is a multi-chain, collateralized cryptocurrency.

Name: Presearch
Description: Presearch aims to deal with the shortcoming of traditional search engines by allowing users to monetize the data instead of the other way around. Presearch does this by paying its users to utilize its search engine.

Name: Sovryn
Description: Sovryn is a permissionless and non-custodial platform for lending, borrowing, and margin trading Bitcoins. Sovryn is a DeFi platform for Bitcoin users that is live on the RSK mainnet, allowing users to trade Bitcoin natively and permissionless on a decentralized application.

Name: DIA
Description: Decentralized Information Assets (DIA) provides financial institutions with a single source of immutable and verified market data for any market and asset type. DIA is the governance token for the DIA platform.

Name: Somnium Space CUBEs
Description: Built on the Ethereum blockchain, Somnium Space is a vast virtual reality (VR) world. Somnium Space is an open-source platform that allows users to buy homes, digital land, buildings, and a variety of other in-game assets of value in its online multiverse.

Name: bZx Protocol
Description: The bZx protocol enables the building of decentralized applications for margin trading, borrowing, lending, and staking so that lenders, borrowers, and traders can interact with the most flexible decentralized finance protocol across multiple blockchains. bZx is a decentralized, community-run project, with all major protocol changes being decided by the community.

Name: SingularityDAO
Description: An AI-driven, decentralized and blockchain-based organization, SingularityDAO governs DynaSets, diversified baskets of cryptocurrencies assets dynamically managed by AI. In SingularityDAO, voting is decided by using the SDAO token (SDAO).

Name: DerivaDAO
Description: DerivaDAO is a decentralized exchange (DEX) used to trade derivatives on Ethereum. Real-time price feed, fast trade resolution, and a competitive fee structure are amongst DerivaDAO’s key performance advantages over other DEXs.

Name: Doge Army Token
Description: Doge Army Token (DGAT) is a doge token built specifically for the doge fan community. Doge Army Token aims to cultivate a community that unifies all doge fans. Members of the community are rewarded weekly through redistributions and giveaway events.

Name: Refereum
Description: RFR is an Ethereum-based token used on the Refereum platform. Refereum offers gamers rewards for engaging with their favorite games and streamers.

Name: Voxies
Description: Voxie Tactics, a free-to-play tactical game uses Voxies (VOXEL) as its native utility currency. VOXEL allows players to purchase in-game items such as weapons and armor. As with Voxies NFTs, VOXEL tokens can be purchased within the game and then sold in the secondary market.

Name: AVINOC
Description: AVINOC (AVIation Network Operation Chain) provides a single, consistent, integrated, and permissionless data layer for decentralized, transparent, and global business flight coordination across all general aviation sectors, thereby enhancing cost efficiency and optimizing utilization.

Name: Elastos
Description: In addition to utilizing blockchain technology, Elastos also provides a peer-to-peer network for communication, centralized data storage, and a decentralized ID system for all users and digital assets. Elastos' main benefit is that it gives you full control over your digital assets, and you don't need to access the internet to use DApps.

Name: TempleDAO
Description: TempleDAO seeks to provide DeFi users with a safe haven where they can escape the volatility of crypto markets and take advantage of investment opportunities that offer high returns and steady price appreciation.

Name: Ampleforth Governance Token
Description: By allowing the community to gain control of the protocol, FORTH is the governance token of Ampleforth (AMPL) that completes the AMPL ecosystem. FORTH tokens are available to those who have interacted on-chain with the AMPL ecosystem.

Name: Toucan Protocol: Base Carbon Tonne
Description: Base Carbon Tonnes (BCT) is an ERC 20 opaque token bridged by the Toucan Protocol. It represents one tonne of carbon from the Verra Verified Carbon Unit (VCU), with each VCU depicting a real emission saving from a project. The Toucan Bridge is the first to allow carbon credit users to bridge their VCUs into crypto.

Name: Coin of the champions
Description: COC is the first Token that has multiple purposes and objectives that is supported by past and present athletes. COC distributes COCs to various non-profit organizations around the world and at both the national and international levels, which will be formalized over time. Holders of the COC tokens can use them in many commercial activities, including the purchase of goods and services.

Name: Vega Protocol
Description: Tendermint-based Vega is a proof-of-stake protocol that makes it possible to trade derivatives on a decentralized network with comparable experience to centralized ones. Among many other privileges, Holders of the VEGA governance token are able to vote on the creation of new markets on the network and earn fees from traders through staking and delegating.

Name: Ambire AdEx
Description: Ambire AdEx is a decentralized solution for online advertising that eliminates fraud, optimizes budgets, and protects user privacy. Ambire AdEx’s open-source protocol for digital advertising is implemented in the ad exchange using Ethereum.

Name: Tokocrypto
Description: Tokocrypto's TKO cryptocurrency from Indonesia is the first to present a hybrid token model. Tokocrypto Tokens are used for various purposes on the Tokocrypto blockchain platform, including participating in crypto exchanges, deposit and savings programs, cross-platform DeFi applications, and NFT marketplaces.

Name: Manchester City Fan Token
Description: Developed by Socios.com, a Chiliz-based application, Manchester City Fan Token is a fan token. The club's tokens allow holders to influence club decisions, unlock VIP rewards, and access exclusive promotions, games, and recognition.

Name: Qi Dao
Description: QiDao is a community-governed, self-sustaining DeFi protocol built on Polygon that allows users to borrow stablecoins (soft pegged to USD) interest-free against crypto assets.

Name: COCOS BCX
Description: COCOS - BlockChain Expedition (BCX) is a platform dedicated to building "the next generation of the digital game economy". Cocos-BCX aims to provide developers with a highly convenient and complete multi-platform runtime environment for game development. In the future, COCOS intends to move from the in-game economy which uses fungible tokens to using a blockchain entirely.

Name: Star Atlas
Description: Star Atlas is a space-themed grand strategy game built on the Solana blockchain. In the Star Atlas metaverse, players trade, acquire, and create non-fungible tokens (NFTs) that reflect the value, tangibility, and ownership of real-world assets.

Name: Bluzelle
Description: Bluzelle is a decentralized storage network for the creator economy. The Bluzelle platform is censorship-resistant, delivers unparalleled security, and is unmatched in terms of availability. Artists, musicians, scientists, publishers, developers, and creators alike can trust Bluzelle in the protection of their intellectual property.

Name: Dash Diamond
Description: Users of the DECONOMY ecosystem are rewarded with the Dash Diamond coin for their social behavior.

Name: DeversiFi
Description: DeversiFi is a layer 2 Ethereum exchange designed to help users take advantage of Decentralised Finance (DeFi). DeversiFi users can swap, trade, yield farm, send and invest in some of the best DeFi interest-earning opportunities without paying Ethereum gas costs, all from the security and control of their private wallet.

Name: Woonkly Power
Description: The Woonkly Power (WOOP) is a DeFi protocol that uses Blockchain technology to operate a Decentralized Social Network in which the money advertisers spend to post advertisements is shared with the audience who interacts with it, be it posts, photos, podcasts, videos, or podcasts. WOOP made this possible by operating on its own mainnet (Hyperledger BESU and Polkadot), which is connected to Binance Smart Chain (BSC).

Name: Silo Finance
Description: Silo Finance (SILO) is a non-custodial lending protocol for borrowing crypto assets with another. The SILO protocol is secure, efficient, and inclusive. With SILO, any token can serve as collateral.

Name: Contentos
Description: The Contentos blockchain protocol aims to establish a decentralized digital market for content that supports all stakeholders, including creators, consumers, and advertisers and rewards them according to their contributions.

Name: ShibaDoge
Description: ShibaDoge is a cryptocurrency created by Shiba and Dogecoin whales to benefit both communities. ShibaDoge is a self-deflating token that features anti-whale: wallets are limited to 1% total supply available; self-deflationary: supplies are reduced with every transaction; and anti-botting.

Name: PolySwarm
Description: PolySwarm, a community, and network for detecting malware uses NCT tokens to power its community. In return for cybersecurity data, NCT rewards are distributed to users. Insights provided by the network are accessed with NCT.

Name: Ribbon Finance
Description: Ribbon Finance creates structured products that deliver sustainable yields using financial engineering. Ribbon Finance’s first product is designed around automated option strategies that maximize yield. In addition, developers can combine various DeFi derivatives to create arbitrary structured products.

Name: BarnBridge
Description: BarnBridge is a protocol for tokenizing risks. The BarnBridge project extends DeFi's functionality to make it more efficient and flexible. Barnbridge can reduce volatility for conservative investors or increase it for daytraders by tokenizing market fluctuations and exposure to risks.

Name: Rarible
Description: Rarible is an NFT marketplace and issuance platform that utilizes the RARI token to empower users, especially creators, who actively interact with the protocol. On the Rarible platform, users can easily create non-fungible tokens (NFTs) for digital items such as artwork, games, and more. In order to create a smooth and easy user experience, the platform offers users a fully-featured marketplace that can be filtered and sorted using different categories.

Name: Cudos
Description: Cudos is a Layer 1 network that provides scalable distributed computing directly to smart contracts or bridged blockchains. With Cudos, blockchain developers and services can access a global pool of computing power.

Name: NFTX
Description: NFTX is a community-operated protocol and platform for creating non-fungible tokens (NFT) backed by ERC-20 tokens. In addition to enabling the creation and trading of funds, NFTX tracks sought-after collectibles such as CryptoKitties, CypherPunks, and others.

Name: ApeSwap
Description: ApeSwap (BANANA) is a decentralized exchange (DEX) for Binance Smart Chain (BSC) tokens. Apeswap offers a complete toolkit for DeFi uses including the purchase of tokens that trade against BANANA, token swaps, providing liquidity, staking, lending and borrowing, IDOs, and margin trading.

Name: Hector Finance
Description: The HEC token is part of a financial center being developed by Hector Finance on the Fantom Opera Chain and beyond.

Name: Bytecoin
Description: Bytecoin is a private, decentralized cryptocurrency with open source code that everyone can contribute to the development of the Bytecoin network. Bytecoin is the best solution for those who want to keep their finances secured and private.

Name: Trustswap
Description: The TrustSwap platform, cryptocurrency, and protocol promise to contribute to a brand new era of decentralized finance (DeFi). TrustSwap aims to achieve this through next-generation multi-chain token swaps and other functionalities that aim to solve existing problems with split payments, subscriptions, and cross-chain token swaps.

Name: e-Money
Description: In addition to being a payment method, e-Money serves as a store of value. e-Money uses NGM as its staking token. By staking their NGM tokens, holders become eligible for NGM rewards.

Name: Streamr XDATA
Description: Streamr Network (XDATA) allows you to connect your data to the rest of the world with a bulletproof publisher/subscriber data transfer layer. Streamr promises a fast, scalable, and secured network that can be accessed anywhere as long as Javascript is operable.

Name: Peony Coin
Description: Peony Coin (PNY) is a proof-of-stake coin using the Scrypt algorithm. Peony Coin allows consumers to directly purchase farm products from farmers. Furthermore, users can participate in farmland, individual animals, special agriculture services, and assets.

Name: Cortex
Description: The Cortex platform is an open-source, distributed, peer-to-peer blockchain platform that can be used to execute Artificial Intelligence (AI) models. With Cortex (CTXC), users will be able to infer using cutting-edge machine-learning models using smart contracts on the Cortex blockchain.

Name: CateCoin
Description: The Catecoin (CATE) is the world's first CAT-themed catcoin, launched with the intention of contributing real value to the world of memes. With Catecoin Meme Platform, meme creators can earn with their memes and create NFTs in a decentralized manner.

Name: Rich Quack
Description: Rich Quack is another hyper-deflationary Binance Smart Chain (BSC) meme token that aims to generate yields frictionlessly while paying rewards to holders. Rich Quack aims to provide its holders with opportunities to earn money, through investing, building, holding, and winning.

Name: MixMarvel
Description: Through MIXMARVEL, global players and developers come together as one to create a large-scale virtual 3D world powered by blockchain. The mission of MixMarvel is to build the future of gaming by connecting developers, content creators, and players over shared value networks.

Name: Groestlcoin
Description: Groestlcoin is a proof-of-work cryptocurrency that can be used every day. The average block time for Groestlcoin is one minute, as opposed to Bitcoin's ten. Groestlcoin's developers aim to build a blockchain network in which all existing users have equal chances of mining.

Name: Fuse
Description: The Fuse Network is an infrastructure that supports token-based applications while being fast and low cost. Offering mobile alternatives to banking and plug-and-play platforms, the project presents a scalable payment system for all. Fuse Network’s growing ecosystem consists of DeFi, NFTs, and payments.

Name: Mossland
Description: Mossland is a blockchain-based metaverse that connects the virtual and real worlds. Mossland has continuously released applications of virtual reality, augmented reality, and non-fungible tokens (NFTs) for the entertainment industry.

Name: Bella Protocol
Description: Bella's crypto banking platform offers a range of DeFi products to streamline the crypto banking process. Regardless of whether users are new or seasoned, Bella automates everything possible, from subsidizing gas fees to being accessible both on-chain and through Bella’s custodian services.

Name: Aleph.im
Description: Open-source and cross-chain Aleph.im is a decentralized database and identity framework that includes file storage, computing, and file management. Aleph.im's core mission is to help decentralized apps and protocols rid themselves of centralized components and achieve a fully decentralized architecture.

Name: Kava Lend
Description: Kava Lend is a decentralized money market built on the Kava Platform that allows cross-chain lending and borrowing of assets. Deposits can be made with Kava Lend for BTC, XRP, BNB, BUSD, and USDX. Additionally, overcollateralized loans will be supported on the platform.

Name: Litentry
Description: Litentry provides Decentralized Identity (DID) indexing through a network of substrate-based credit computation, as well as a decentralized identity aggregation protocol across multiple networks. Litentry consists of decentralized identity and user activity data aggregation infrastructure that allows users to aggregate identities from other chains, as well as to match identities and stake identities.

Name: Silent Notary
Description: SilentNotary is a multiplatform decentralized service that is used to convert digital events into legally significant evidence, with the purpose of confirming the existence of digital events like digital correspondences, images and videos.

Name: Firo
Description: Firo, formerly named Zcoin, is a cryptocurrency that aims to be private digital cash. It accomplishes this by letting users burn their coins and redeem new ones which have an empty transaction history.

Name: Token Pocket
Description: TokenPocket Token, or TPT, is an applicational token that represents Token Pocket users and developers’ rights in the Token Pocket ecosystem.TPT also serves as an important link between the wallet, users and developers.

Name: Unifty
Description: Unifty provides tools for digital artists or collectible issuers to create their own contracts for different purposes without having any kind of coding knowledge. All contracts created with Unifty are 100% owned and controlled by the user. The token NIF is a utility token used for their NFT swapping dApp and NFT valuation and exchange.

Name: Terra Virtua Kolect
Description: Terra Virtua Kolect is a cross-platform NFT ecosystem, facilitating a curated marketplace for interaction between NFT creators and collectors. The Terra Virtua Kolect project raised $2.6 million and is partnered with Legendary Entertainment and Paramount Pictures.

Name: Tellor
Description: Tellor is a decentralized oracle network, which is a kind of network that supplies valuable off-chain data onto the blockchain. Tellor supplies data which can be requested, validated and transparently transferred on-chain.

Name: Splinterlands
Description: Splinterlands is a digital collectible NFT card game that is inspired by the likes of Magic the Gathering and Hearthstone where players build their card collection, each one having different abilities and strategic advantages, and bring them out to battle others.

Name: Tectonic
Description: Tectonic is a cross-chain money market that works like a lending platform. Investors can deposit their crypto assets into Tectonic to earn dynamic yield and on the other hand, borrowers can give their crypto assets as collateral to borrow the funds in the liquidity.

Name: BoringDAO [OLD]
Description: BoringDAO is a decentralized bridge that connects different blockchain assets onto one single platform, thus enabling assets to be transferred across different chains in a cost efficient and timely manner.

Name: SelfKey
Description: SelfKey is a blockchain based digital identity system where users can claim identity evidence, instantly apply for passports, residency and financial services as well as signing up for exchanges and participating in token sales safely.

Name: hi Dollar
Description: HI uses blockchain technology to build services that are community powered. It does this with the HI dollar, a membership token that drives utility within the ecosystem to maximize the benefit of its members. The first product of HI is a digital wallet that provides members with the most seamless payment experience through social messengers.

Name: Talken
Description: Talken aims to be an one-stop NFT suite for creating, collecting, storing and trading digital collectibles from K-pop stars, celebrities and artists. It also offers the first Korean multichain decentralized NFT wallet.

Name: Nominex
Description: Nominex is the first centralized exchange to successfully launch a utility staking model, and Nominex Token (NMX) is the DeFi token used for staking. Depending on the amount of NMX invested, stakers will achieve different tiers of partner level which reward bonuses just for using the Nominex exchange itself.

Name: Phonon DAO
Description: Phonon is a community-owned, open-source protocol which uses secure hardware to allow for off-chain transfers of digital assets. It enables crypto to be turned to P2P cash via private, fast and free transactions.

Name: QASH
Description: The QASH token powers all services from the exchange Liquid, which is regulated by the Japan FSA and adheres to the requirements of most regulated markets.

Name: Bean
Description: Bean is a USD-pegged stablecoin created on the Ethereum blockchain by Beanstalk, a decentralized credit-based stablecoin protocol. The reason Beanstalk opts for credit instead of collateral to back up their coins is to create a decentralized and blockchain-native asset. Beanstalk maintains Bean’s stability by creating financial incentives to encourage peg maintenance and governance.

Name: Retreeb
Description: Retreeb is a decentralized payment solution that is built on the Fantom blockchain and prioritizes ethical values. It aims to provide unprecedented transparency and emphasizes social and environmental responsibility with their business model. One third of the income Retreeb made from merchant fees will be donated to a social project selected by the user issuing the transaction.

Name: Yieldly
Description: The Yieldly DeFi ecosystem is built on the Algorand blockchain, with the purpose of setting a new standard regarding the convenience, simplicity and security of the exchange of digital assets. Moreover, Yieldly has built the first no-loss lottery to collect Algorand’s reward system, aggregate and distribute those rewards to users.

Name: Aion
Description: The Open Application Network (OAN) is designed to facilitate a public environment for Open Apps creation and Aion is the token used to secure and access this network. OAN’s main goal is to provide interoperability between blockchains so as to let users create applications, execute smart contracts, store and share data.

Name: MAP Protocol
Description: MAP protocol provides a secure solution for moving and exchanging blockchain assets. The protocol consists of three layers: an infrastructure blockchain for connecting to other blockchains, , a MAP Asset layer where assets are mapped to MAP chain via smart contract, and a DeFi Application layer to enable dApps, games, NFTs…

Name: Steem Dollars
Description: Steem Dollars (SBD) aims to be a stablecoin and its value is meant to be pegged to the USD. It is intended to be a much more stable option compared to STEEM.

Name: Mad Meerkat ETF
Description: Mad Meerkat ETF is a decentralized protocol running on METF token. The team behind Mad Meerkat ETF describes it as a DEX Traded Fund.

Name: GridPlus [OLD]
Description: Grid+ offers multiple services to store and use crypto safely. GridPlus Lattice1 is a programmable hardware wallet that features a large touch screen as well as wireless connectivity. Grid+ also offers SafeCards to back up seed phrases on a portable, PIN-protected card.

Name: Vader Protocol
Description: VADER is a decentralized liquidity protocol that features an Automated Market Maker (AMM) as well as a native stablecoin, USDV. VADER is the native utility token of the protocol.

Name: Vite
Description: The VITE token is used for token transactions and smart-contract executions on the Vite network. Instead of paying gas fee, users stake VITE for transaction quota, and VITE can also be used to vote. Unused transaction quota can be leased to dApps in exchange for their tokens.

Name: BitMart Token
Description: BitMart is a cryptocurrency trading platform that uses advanced risk-control measures such as a hybrid hot/cold wallet system and multi-signature technologies. BitMart is a one-stop platform for cryptocurrency investment and management.

Name: Quantstamp
Description: Quantstamp provides expert security audits and blockchain solutions for top crypto companies like Ethereum 2.0, Binance, MakerDAO, Chainlink and eToro. QSP is an ERC-20 token used to verify smart contracts on the decentralized QSP Security Protocol.

Name: Phoenix Global [OLD]
Description: Phoenix Global develops and deploys dApps for enterprises with the customer in mind. dApps built by Phoenix Global are meant to be scalable, to have built-in connectivity to the real world, and have multi-layered smart contracts.

Name: FIO Protocol
Description: FIO is a blockchain protocol that is designed to facilitate an improved method of sending/receiving cryptocurrencies. The FIO token is the native utility token of the protocol, used for transaction gas fees and on-chain governance.

Name: Koda Cryptocurrency
Description: Koda Cryptocurrency is a meme token existing on the Binance Smart Chain. The core values of Koda are trust, education and ease of use. For every buy and sell, a percentage of the fee is split among all holders.

Name: DeRace
Description: DeRace aims to be a “complete NFT horse racing ecosystem” and set a new standard for betting/gaming industries. Users of DeRace can breed NFT horses with unique characteristics, bet on real-time NFT horse races, and build their own NFT hippodrome to host races.

Name: BSCPAD
Description: BSCPAD is designed to fix the fundamental flaws among current launchpads to take over as the next evolution of blockchain launchpads. The platform aims to provide opportunities to investors of all budgets and create benefits to all BSCPAD token holders. It does this by using a two-round system that guarantees an allocation for every tier level and omits the luck factor.

Name: ParaSwap
Description: ParaSwap is an aggregator that combines decentralized exchanges and other DeFi services in one comprehensive interface.

Name: Nexus
Description: Nexus is a community-driven project designed to simplify lives, empower communities and streamline businesses with a vision of making connection free and available for everyone. Nexus develops automated key management functions to let people access their wallet accounts with the familiarity of a username, password and PIN. Other technologies by Nexus include a DAO for governance and Safenet, a hack-resistant operating system.

Name: Position Token
Description: Position Exchange is a new decentralized trading protocol aiming to enhance trading experiences in crypto markets. It accomplishes this by offering accessible and easy-to-use Derivatives Trading that is fully on-chain, transparent, and secure. Position Token, or POSI, is the exchange’s utility token, functioning as an important part in the Position ecosystem.

Name: Nuls
Description: Nuls describes itself as a microservice-driven blockchain project that offers blockchain solutions for smart contracts, private chains, public chains, dApps and NRC-20 tokenization. Nuls also facilitates a chain-building tool called Chain Factory, and it uses the Proof of Credit (PoC) consensus mechanism.

Name: Genopets
Description: Genopets is a free-to-play, move-to-earn NFT game on the Solana blockchain. Genopets rewards an active lifestyle by combining users’ step data from their mobile devices with a play-to-earn economic model. This way, players earn crypto by taking action in real life when they explore the Genoverse.

Name: CoW Protocol
Description: CoW is designed to help users trade crypto assets with the best possible exchange rate and save on gas costs, AMM fees and execution risk. CoW does this by letting users delegate the execution of the trades to ‘solvers’, who either bid on the best exchange rate or compare quotes from leading aggregators. COW token grants holders the right to vote in the CowDAO as well as fee discounts when trading on CowSwap.

Name: Morpheus Network
Description: Morpheus Network aims to optimize supply chains via their SaaS platform which integrates existing and emerging technologies. Besides, it provides chain managers with a Digital Footprint, used to facilitate shipment and item visibility for automating safe supply chains.

Name: Sentinel Protocol
Description: Sentinel Protocol’s mission is to use blockchain technology to gather collective cyber security intelligence to fight against hackers, scams and frauds.

Name: Ooki
Description: Ooki is a decentralized protocol for margin trading, borrowing, lending and staking. It enables the creation of applications that let lenders, borrowers and traders to interact with great flexibility on multiple blockchains. The Ooki Token is a governance token used for the voting in the Ooki DAO.

Name: Beethoven X
Description: Beethoven X is an investment platform that offers secure and efficient trading with high speed, low cost and no need for registration. Beethoven X is the first next-gen AMM protocol built on Fantom Opera.

Name: Mad Meerkat Optimizer
Description: Mad Meerkat Optimizer (MM Optimizer) is designed to help users “join the bandwagon of the DeFi world” by being a Yield Aggregator that compounds users yields through the Cronos Chain.

Name: Crypterium
Description: Crypterieum provides a mobile app which enables the spending of cryptocurrencies in everyday life. Options in the app include trading, topping up users’ phones, opening a savings account, and ordering global crypto cards.

Name: Nest Protocol
Description: Nest Protocol is a decentralized oracle (an oracle sends data from the outside world into a blockchain) that provides a creative solution to verify on-chain data.

Name: WHALE
Description: WHALE is a social token backed by the best NFT collection, The Vault, which fundamentally underpins the value of WHALE. The token was launched on Ethereum, aiming to enable anyone to become a whale with WHALE.

Name: BEAM
Description: BEAM is a confidential decentralized finance platform functioning on 2 blockchain protocols: LelantusMW and Mimblewimble. Modern blockchain analysis can trace transactions back to the senders, so BEAM created innovative methods to increase the anonymity of transactions, address balances and user identities.

Name: chrono.tech
Description: Chrono.tech offers blockchain solutions for recruitment, HR and payment processes, helping people in the global marketplace to access work and transfer funds securely. The TIME token is the native token of the Chrono.tech ecosystem, used to achieve premium account status or for staking.

Name: BEPRO Network
Description: BEPRO Network is an autonomous protocol for decentralized development regarding multiple sections like DeFi, Gaming, Prediction Markets… The protocol provides its own codebase as well as acts as a system to connect developers with operators.

Name: PolyPad
Description: PolyPad aims to make access to early-stage blockchain projects available for everyone. PolyPad builds a launchpad specifically for promising projects on the Polygon chain.

Name: Vires Finance
Description: Vires.finance is a decentralized non-custodial liquidity protocol that lets users participate as lenders or borrowers. Lenders deposit their assets to provide liquidity, earning passive income in the process, while borrowers can take a loan with collateral. Built on the Waves blockchain, Vires.finance allows for the lending and borrowing of WAVES, USDN, ETH, USDT, BTC, EURN, AND USDC.

Name: SnowBlossom
Description: SnowBlossom aims to be a fresh take on cryptocurrency that is simple, portable and scalable. It is coded in a straightforward fashion, thus allowing anyone to verify and contribute.

Name: Paris Saint-Germain Fan Token
Description: The Paris Saint-Germain Fan Token (PSG) is a utility token used in the Socios application and service. The token gives its holders a share of influence on club decisions, and also allows them to get exclusive rewards, club recognition and more.

Name: PARSIQ
Description: PARSIQ is a platform for monitoring and intelligence. It offers analytic tools to track network activity in real time, create instant notifications and react to events of interest on a variety of networks.

Name: Spool DAO Token
Description: Spool’s mission is to let everyone engage with DeFi on their own terms in a single deposit with no compromises. Spool provides an easy way to discover and access the best options in the DeFi space to ensure that users’ capital goes where it’s most aligned with their own goals.

Name: GYEN
Description: GYEN is the world's first regulated stablecoin pegged to the Japanese YEN. It is issued by GMO-Z.com Trust Company.

Name: MContent
Description: MContent describes itself as the world’s first tokenized content ecosystem, aiming to create direct financing and investments for deserving content creators, film professionals and media artists by connecting them with global investors and a global audience.

Name: SIX Network
Description: With the help of blockchain and smart contracts, SIX Network wants to unleash the full potential of digital assets. This is because it will provide decentralized financial services and provide a blockchain infrastructure that businesses need. Businesses across industries will be able to create projects on multi-blockchain networks, thanks to the company's flagship products such as "SIX Protocol" and "Definix."

Name: Gods Unchained
Description: GODS is an ERC-20 token that is used within the Gods Unchained ecosystem. Gods Unchained is a free-to-play and play-to-earn turn-based card game. It is led by one of the former directors of Magic The Gathering: Arena, the most well-known competitive fantasy card game in the world. Unlike a real, tangible card, players in God's Unchained own their digital items, which gives them complete control over trading, selling, and using them however they choose.

Name: Bytom
Description: Bytom is a value-exchange open-source protocol. Its goal is tokenization that will be used for real-world assets, such as warrants, stocks, bonds, and dividends. Almost any type of asset can be created on the Bytom blockchain and circulated freely.

Name: Altura
Description: The Altara platform lets game developers create, distribute, and trade Smart NFTs, which represent in-game items. Unlike regular NFTs, Smart NFTs have dynamic attributes that can change based on different conditions and environments. They are the next evolution in bringing decentralized in-game items into the mainstream as they represent a vast array of opportunities that traditional NFTs cannot provide.

Name: Dola
Description: Dola is a stablecoin launched on top of the Ethereum platform in February 2021. It is a debt and asset-backed, capital-efficient, decentralized token from Inverse Finance.

Name: Stafi
Description: StaFi stands for Staking Finance. It is one of the first DeFi protocols to unlock the liquidity of staked assets. Through StaFi, users can stake their PoS tokens and receive rTokens.  StaFi rTokens are synthetic staking derivatives issued when a user stakes a PoS token by using the rToken App. Consequently, rTokens can be traded while staking rewards are still actively collected.

Name: RAMP
Description: With RAMP, DeFi users can stake tokens on Ethereum platforms without having to be Ethereum users and Ethereum users have the opportunity to increase their yield. The network uses liquidity on/off-ramps in order to efficiently power token exchanges between blockchains.

Name: Unizen
Description: Unizen is an operating system for applications that enables cross-chain exchanges. Through a unified interface, Unizen provides a simple means of acquiring any asset, at the best fees, regardless of the trading style. The platform's trading module is powered by Binance Cloud, which enables users to trade with Binance-shared liquidity.

Name: Axion
Description: Axion is a crypto account equivalent to a certificate of deposit (CD) account that promises a steady return based on inflation of 8%. It effectively bridges the gap between mainstream investors and cryptocurrencies.

Name: CargoX
Description: CargoX provides the ability to send digital documents instantly anywhere in the world. Shipments via CargoX are sent using a blockchain. Its aim is to compete with major carriers such as DHL, Fedex, and UPS.

Name: Tracer DAO
Description: Tracer DAO (TCR) is an open-source protocol that uses smart contracts for executing derivatives. Tracer Factory templates allow anyone to quickly and easily deploy a derivatives trading market, so they can control their financial risk digitally in real-time. Tracer Perpetual Pools, its brand-new derivatives market, allows anyone to take a short or long position on any underlying asset. The positions are perpetual, non-liquid, fully collateralized, fully fungible, and do not require any upkeep.

Name: MATH
Description: MATH is a crypto platform that hosts several apps in the MathChain such as Math Wallet, Math DApp Store, Mathpay, etc. Since its founding in 2018, it has been supporting more than 63 public blockchains. The platform allows users to build their portfolios by using automated quantitative trading.

Name: Impossible Finance Launchpad
Description: The Impossible Finance Launchpad (IDIA) empowers you with high-quality, fair, and accessible cryptocurrency investment opportunities and is the leading crypto investment platform. Through its accelerator, the launchpad simplifies DeFi investing, trading, and yields.

Name: MANTRA DAO
Description: OM is a native utility token on MANTRA DAO that is used for staking, lending, and governance. It is currently being developed on the RioChain, and will furthermore integrate with the Polkadot ecosystem. The platform is primarily intended to serve as an ecosystem for Web 3.0.

Name: Frontier
Description: Founded in 2013, Frontier is an open-source decentralized finance (DeFi) aggregator. Frontier's platform lets you manage stakes, DeFi positions, best-rate asset swaps, determine liquidity, and create and monitor CDPs. Frontier is providing users with the core features of DeFi, regardless of the platform they are using.

Name: Kleros
Description: The Kleros (PNK) platform launched in July 2018 and provides a decentralized dispute resolution mechanism. The protocol uses blockchain technology and crowdsourcing to arbitrate disputes fairly through an open-source online platform. The protocol essentially works as a mediator between DApps and their users. In the case of a dispute, Kleros charges a fee, payable in ETH, which is provided by the disputing parties or derived from previously escrowed funds.

Name: New BitShares
Description: New BitShares (NBS) is a platform that supports DeFi businesses and decentralized exchanges by implementing the DPOS consensus. DPOS (Delegated Proof of Stake) is a consensus algorithm developed to ensure that transactions on a blockchain are correctly represented. It is intended as a technology-based democracy implementation, which is secured by a voting and election process to prevent any centralization and malicious use of the blockchain.

Name: Rainicorn
Description: Rainicorn is a revolutionary NFT farming platform, which allows its users to mint their own limited edition NFT-based projects. Using $RAINI, you can unlock many interconnected streams of value. You can earn rewards by staking or providing liquidity and redeem them without any additional effort.

Name: Revolution Populi
Description: Revolution Populi is a crypto project dedicated to returning data sovereignty to the people. The platform is basically an open Web3 ecosystem for apps, ranging from social to financial to games.

Name: Zignaly
Description: Through Zignaly, retail investors have a secure way to invest with professional asset managers. Users and traders receive automatically distributed profits, without any upfront payment from Zignaly or the professional trader. With its performance-based business model, the platform is arguably one of the industry's most cost-efficient wealth management tools.

Name: ApolloX
Description: ApolloX is the first crypto derivatives exchange that incorporates both CEX and DEX. Founded in 2021, ApolloX's mission is to lower entry barriers so everyone has access to crypto, not just the elite. The ApolloX platform offers users the option of trading perpetual futures with leverage as high as 50x. $APX is the platform's utility token and is acquired via trading rewards on ApolloX as a reward.

Name: Hotbit Token
Description: $HTB is a token of the Hotbit trading platform that runs on the Ethereum platform. The exchange platform provides trading services between major digital currencies such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, making it one of the world's leading professional digital asset exchange platforms. Hotbit boasts world-class security and has never experienced any loss of assets due to a security vulnerability.

Name: StarTerra
Description: StarTerra is a special kind of launchpad that is gamified by a system of competition. Built on the Terra ecosystem, StarTerra allows members to stake more STT than the minimum amount required to get their project higher on the ‘leaderboard’, leading to a better chance of winning allocation to buy IDO. There is competition between different tiers (called “factions”) and between projects in the same tier as well.

Name: Reflexer Ungovernance Token
Description: Reflexer Ungovernance Token (FLX) is a token used on the Rai Reflex Index (RAI) system, an ETH-backed stable asset. FLX can either serve to be automatically created in case the RAI system is underwater as a last resort, or used to ungovern the RAI system: which is to let the community decide how to remove themselves from the protocol.

Name: Ovr
Description: Ovr is a platform created on the Ethereum blockchain for hosting and visualizing geo-located AR and VR contents. It does this by dividing Earth into 1.6 trillion hexagons, each one representing a unique location. The owner of this location can then host an AR/VR experience on it, including gaming, live events, virtual retail, tourism, and more.

Name: SOLVE
Description: Solve is a healthcare company that utilizes blockchain to create a new way to coordinate healthcare. It aims to improve access to care, reduce administration costs, healthcare fraud and waste. The Solve ecosystem takes into consideration patients’ medical conditions, economic and social needs and other criteria to coordinate resources.

Name: JET
Description: Running on the Solana blockchain, Jet describes itself as a decentralized borrowing and lending protocol with an emphasis on speed, power and scalability. There is also an on-chain governance system on Jet that lets Jet holders have a say in how Jet operates.

Name: pSTAKE Finance
Description: pSTAKE Finance is a liquid staking solution that lets users deposit their PoS tokens to mint ERC-20 derivative tokens that can be used in the Ethereum DeFi Ecosystem. Depending on liquidity, usage and other factors, these derivative assets can later be expanded to other chains.

Name: Liquity
Description: Liquity is a decentralized borrowing protocol built on Ethereum. It lets Ether holders withdraw loans in the form of LQTY (a USD-pegged stablecoin) with algorithmically adjusted redemption and issuance fees.

Name: Carbon Protocol
Description: Engineered by Switcheo Labs, Carbon is a decentralized layer 2 cross-chain trading protocol that facilitates the trading of advanced financial instruments like options, bonds and futures, at scale. Carbon Protocol’s mission is to let anyone bootstrap open financial markets on any blockchain, and for any asset type.

Name: Planet Finance
Description: Planet Finance aims to enable everyone to put their capital to work at low risk with high yields. It is a protocol that consists of different planets, each with their own DeFi app. Built on Binance Smart Chain, AQUA is a governance token for the Planet Finance ecosystem.

Name: Aeternity
Description: Aeternity has a mission to erase inefficiencies in the crypto market by increasing scalability of smart contracts, dApps, and off-chain execution. The Aeternity chain enables off-chain smart contract settlement and transaction execution without intermediaries.

Name: Celo Euro
Description: Celo Euro (cEUR) is a Euro-pegged digital stable asset that is supported by multiple crypto assets in the Celo Reserve, including BTC and ETH. cEUR is meant to be a fast, cheap, stable and convenient way for people worldwide to transfer money on their smartphones.

Name: Fodl Finance
Description: Fodl Finance allows people to use leverage for their trades without paying a funding rate. It does this by deriving the leverage from existing DeFi building blocks like Compound and Aave.

Name: Bone ShibaSwap
Description: Bone ShibaSwap, or BONE, is a governance token of the ShibaSwap ecosystem. BONE holders can vote on upcoming proposals, and the more BONE one holds, the more weight their vote carries.

Name: EDEN
Description: Eden is a transaction network that protects users from malicious behaviors like frontrunning and sandwich attacks. Besides, it improves earnings for block producers, increases security against block reorganization, as well as redistributes value to stakeholders.

Name: Newscrypto Coin
Description: The Newscrypto Coin, or NWC, acts as both a utility token and a value-transfer token for the Newscrypto platform. The token is Stella Lumen compliant and used to bind data from the blockchain to its corresponding product as information for Newscrypto users. It also underpins all transactions for the network.

Name: NAGA
Description: NAGA is a social investing platform that offers access to the best market tools for everyone. NAGA Coin (NGC) acts as fuel for every NAGA subsection, including NAGA Trader, NAGA DeFI and NAGA Social Betting. Users can utilize NGC to decrease fees, create smart contracts for trading and more.

Name: Koinos
Description: Koinos describes itself as a brand new blockchain built from the ground up, with a level of scalability, performance, and upgradability needed to enable people’s ownership of their digital selves. KOIN, a proof-of-work ERC-20 token, will determine the initial token supply of the Koinos mainnet.

Name: The Doge NFT
Description: The Doge NFT is a gateway to joining the DAOGE, which describes itself as a “a metalabel for fractionalized memes, and an internet cult social club.”

Name: Velo
Description: The Velo Protocol is a blockchain financial protocol that enables digital credit issuance and smart contract usage to transfer assets. It powers the Velo Labs, which aims to be a unique federated credit exchange network.

Name: MovieBloc
Description: MovieBloc is a decentralized movie and content distribution platform with a mission to take away the dominant power of the entertainment industry conglomerates. Some of the perks MovieBloc offers are transparent revenue share and audience data to content creators, equal screening opportunities, access to diverse films and content for the viewers, and rewards for contributors who provide curation, subtitles and marketing materials.

Name: Cellframe
Description: Cellframe is a network designed to facilitate an infrastructure for secure and scalable cross-chain transfers through its multichain nature. CELL is the native utility token of the Cellframe network, used for staking, taking part in Cellchain auctions and value transferring within the ecosystem.

Name: Energi
Description: The Energi organization is a blockchain-based financial technology provider with a mission to deliver secure and decentralized financial solutions. The Energi token (NRG) is a PoS cryptocurrency that combines Ethereum smart contract compatibility with a self-funding treasury and a layer 1 and layer 2 protocol. In addition, NRG acts as the governance token for the Energiswap exchange.

Name: Banana
Description: Banana is a fuel token for the CyberKongz ecosystem, which generates 2D/3D NFT social avatars for your online persona as well as offering a gamified experience to collect and mint NFTs. As the CyberKongz universe expands, it intends to add more utility to the Banana token.

Name: GET Protocol
Description: GET Protocol is a protocol for selling smart tickets for events with an emphasis on combating ticket fraud and using blockchain technology.

Name: LockTrip
Description: LockTrip uses blockchain technology to create a new travel marketplace without middlemen. As a result, people can save up to 60% on their bookings by getting rid of unnecessary commission fees. There are multiple payment methods to choose from: credit card, popular cryptocurrencies, or the native LOC token (which bypasses payment fees).

Name: Star Atlas DAO
Description: Star Atlas aims to be a next-generation gaming metaverse. It uses the Solana protocol to create a serverless and secured gameplay experience, and NFTs to establish an economy that is tangible with real ownership.

Name: KRYLL
Description: Kryll aims to be an automated strategies building platform for people with zero developing skill. People can access Kryll’s marketplace to choose from hundreds of community-created crypto trading strategies and use the platform to run these strategies on the cloud 24/7.

Name: Orca
Description: Orca prides itself on being “the most user-friendly DEX on Solana”, striving to bring DeFi to the masses. It acts as an Automated Market Maker (AMM) on which users can swap assets, provide liquidity to earn yield. DeFi projects can also use Orca to integrate swapping, farming and on-chain data into their dApps.

Name: FUSION
Description: Fusion aims to be an all-inclusive blockchain-based financial platform, which means it offers services that are cross-chain, cross-organization and cross-data source. The project utilizes a hybrid system that combines elements from both PoW and PoS, with the goal of creating an efficient and safe platform.

Name: tBTC
Description: tBTC is an open-source project designed to enable the safe usage of Bitcoin in Ethereum DeFi apps. It accomplishes this by letting people exchange BTC for TBTC: an ERC-20 compatible token (every TBTC is backed by at least 1 BTC held in reserve.

Name: HyperCash
Description: HyperCash is designed to facilitate value transfers across different blockchains with 2 types of wallets to choose from: white wallets are publicly viewable, while black wallets are private using zero-knowledge proofs.

Name: Polkaswap
Description: Polkaswap is an open-source, automated market maker that runs on the SORA network and is compatible with the Plokadot and Kusama ecosystem.

Name: Mimo Governance Token
Description: MIMO is the governance token of the Mimo DeFi platform, which lets people enjoy liquidity from the crypto assets without selling them. Users can do this by depositing their assets into Vaults, then mint stable tokens called PAR against them. Once they return enough PAR to the platform, their assets are unlocked.

Name: GameZone
Description: GameZone is a blockchain gaming platform that offers its community early access to new game releases, gaming tokens and NFTsm as well as play-to-earn opportunities, scholarships, tutorials and more.

Name: Futureswap
Description: Futureswap is a decentralized, non-custodial, leverage trading protocol designed to let people gain leveraged exposure on assets. Liquidity providers deposit their assets to earn passive income while this liquidity is used by Futureswap protocol and other AMMs to create leveraged exposure.

Name: Oxen
Description: Oxen, formerly known as LOKI, has a mission to build a private cryptocurrency with instant transactions, a powerful PoS network, a secure messaging platform, and a network anonymity layer. The Oxen coin can be used to stake and to purchase name registrations for Oxen’s onion router (an open-source privacy network that enables anonymous web browsing) and private messenger.

Name: Global Coin Research
Description: Global Coin Research (GCR) is a social cryptocurrency for the decentralized DAO of the same name, designed to be a community of learners and investors. The vision of Global Coin Research is a community where contributors are directly supported by consumers.

Name: Rubic
Description: Rubic is a multi-chain swap protocol that lets users swap 15,000+ assets on Ethereum, Polygon, Binance Smart Chain, Harmony, Telos, Avalanche, Moonriver, Fantom, Solana, Aurora, NEAR and Arbitrum. Moreover, Rubic is connected to 60 DEXs to offer the best rate for on-chain swaps.

Name: Kujira
Description: Kujira is a blockchain-based project that aims to create tools that can be used by everyone, from beginners to seasoned investors, no matter their choice of chain, without requiring them to take on more risk than they can afford.

Name: Akropolis
Description: Akropolis is an Ethereum-based project that operates a decentralized financing protocol that aims to develop an autonomous financial ecosystem, including a lending platform and a saving platform. As part of its protocol governance, AKRO, an ERC-20 token, is used across all of the project's products.

Name: VitaDAO
Description: VitalDAO is a community-owned organization that funds early-stage longevity research. The project discovers and funds the most promising longevity research. To contribute to the VitaDAO project, members can buy VITA tokens, earn them from contributions of work, or earn them through intellectual property contributions.

Name: RAI Finance
Description: RAI Finance provides access to a range of assets, a high level of liquidity, and a wide range of financial use cases for DeFi users. When combined with the cross-chain compatibility of the Polkadot ecosystem, these features make it possible to eliminate fragmentation across decentralized finance systems by providing new assets and increased liquidity.

Name: Gifto
Description: The Gifto (GTO) platform is designed to be a universal, decentralized platform for giving virtual gifts. This social game app is the brainchild of the highly successful Asia Innovations Group, which also owns the successful live streaming app Uplive and several other popular social gaming projects.

Name: DXdao
Description: DXdao describes itself as a cooperative that specializes in the development and governance of decentralized products and services. The DXdao governance system uses reputation-based voting, which means that voting power is not transferable and cannot be bought. The DXD token functions as the engine for the DXdao ecosystem and is eligible for a share of the revenue generated. ENS and binding on-chain votes allow DXdao to manage the blockchain-based treasury and its products completely on-chain.

Name: Numbers Protocol
Description: NUM is a decentralized photo network built for the upcoming Web 3.0. Using Numbers Protocol's decentralized photo network, digital media can be made more social, valuable, and trusted.

Name: Cream
Description: The C.R.E.AM Finance program provides access to financing services for individuals, institutions, and protocols using a decentralized lending protocol. It is a platform that belongs to the yearn.finance's ecosystem. The protocol serves users on Ethereum, Binance, Polygon, and Fantom and is permissionless, open-source, and blockchain agnostic.

Name: Epic Cash
Description: Epic Cash marks a true transition toward a truly decentralized internet-based P2P cash system. It embodies the most fundamental element of a private financial system. Aiming to be the most effective anonymous digital money in the world, EPIC wishes to become the strongest currency around the world.

Name: Shabu Shabu
Description: As a fork of SushiSwap and YFII, Shabu Shabu Finance provides yield farming tools, such as staking tokens in liquidity pools on the Kobe Swap Exchange and Uniswap Exchange, which will enable traders to capitalize on the flow of capital. Its goal is to become a community-governed finance marketplace with a governance token that would determine how Shabu Finance develops and where it goes.

Name: sEUR
Description: sEUR tracks the price of the Euro through a Synthetix-based cryptocurrency. As such, sEUR is a stablecoin that can be used as a medium of exchange, store of value, as well as a method to participate in DeFi protocols like Curve.

Name: Solanium
Description: Solanium is a decentralized platform on the Solana blockchain. Token staking, time-weighted polling, and decentralized fundraising are being added to the Solana ecosystem through this platform. Solanum users will be able to participate in token sales and create pools with their SPL tokens.

Name: Opulous
Description: Opulous is a peer-to-peer DeFi loan platform solution for digital artists. Opulous empowers artists to access funding by bringing decentralized finance to the music industry and provides a launchpad for the first music copyright-backed NFTs.

Name: Aurox Token
Description: Aurox is a unique crypto trading platform that is used by traders from all over the world, powered by URUSm the platform's DeFi token. Aurox developed proprietary alerts, indicators, and trading protocols so traders can make trading decisions with more confidence.

Name: Lossless
Description: Lossless is a tool designed to mitigate hacks for token creators. Fraudulent transactions can be frozen based on fraud identification parameters, which return stolen funds back to the account of the owner. To make the DeFi industry safe for future growth, Lossless aims to prevent and undo all upcoming hacks.

Name: KI
Description: Through an ecosystem of real-life businesses, the Ki Foundation seeks to bridge the gap between CeFi and DeFi. Ki's first market offering is Klub, a platform for private investments that allows high-income individuals to allocate, store, and invest capital.

Name: Snowbank
Description: Snowbank DAO is a protocol on the Avalanche Network. It is a decentralized reserved currency that is backed by a group of assets. Through its staking and minting practices, Snowbank DAO enables the market to participate in economic and game-theoretic dynamics.

Name: 3X Long Ethereum Token
Description: FTX Leveraged tokens, such as ETHBULL, are usually ERC20 & BEP2 tokens that provide leveraged positions in cryptocurrencies. Owning these tokens essentially amplifies their given price volatility. For ETHBULL this volatility is increased by 3x. For example, if the price of ETH moves up 1% your ETHBULL position will increase by 3%.

Name: Edgeware
Description: With the Edgeware platform, developers can build next-generation, decentralized applications on top of a Substrate blockchain. The Edgeware platform enables the development of high-speed, low-latency, and highly efficient consensus algorithms for blockchain-based decentralized applications (DApps).

Name: Sipher
Description: Sipher is a revolutionary play-to-earn (P2E), live-action, blockchain game with RPG elements. The title has two separate game modes (PVP and PVE) that promise meaningful end-game content, an immersive storyline, and robust classes.

Name: BOSAGORA
Description: BOSAGORA's platform allows stakeholders to make democratic decisions on what projects to support, allowing for censorship resistance. The BOSAGORA team is developing Trust Contracts, which will provide an easy-to-develop, efficient, and secure way to create contracts using a language everyone can understand.

Name: Rootkit
Description: Rootkit is a DeFi protocol using a fixed supply currency in combination with a permanent liquidity lock. It, therefore, creates a mathematical price floor. The floor price represents the lowest possible price for a ROOT token that will ever exist, and there will only ever be 10,000 ROOT.

Name: cLINK
Description: cLink is a type of cToken that is distributed to users who lend assets on the Compound network. cTokens are a way for lenders to track how much they've lent, as well as the interest they've earned. A corresponding balance in cTokens is issued to each user who contributes funds to the lending pool.

Name: dForce Token
Description: The dForce team is advocating for the implementation of a complete suite of DeFi protocols as part of the Web3 infrastructure. These protocols include asset management, lending, trading, stakes, and bridge software. Token holders and the community jointly determine key protocol changes in this community-driven project.

Name: Measurable Data Token
Description: Measurable Data Token (MDT) is a utility token whose purpose is anonymous sharing and monetization of consumer data. Data providers and data buyers can exchange data securely and anonymously using the MDT, which is a blockchain-based data economy.

Name: VelasPad
Description: Launched on VELAS Blockchain, the fastest AVM Blockchain in the world, VelasPad is the very first launchpad in the ecosystem. VLXPAD is a fund and development platform that has been designed with a single aim in mind: to fund and support blockchain projects of the future. Platform users have access to exclusive IDOs and Staking Rewards by using the deflationary launchpad token.

Name: Polkadex
Description: The Polkadex Orderbook is a non-custodial peer-to-peer trading platform that combines both decentralized and centralized features for trading in one system. Thanks to the unique tech architecture users get the best of both worlds trading on Polkadex.

Name: Refinable
Description: Refinable is the first major NFT marketplace on BSC, invested by Binance and Mr. Beast, providing individual creators and brands with an easy and affordable way to produce, discover, trade, and leverage NFTs. It is Refinable's mission to empower the next generation of digital transactions by supporting all communities in engaging with NFTs.

Name: DexTools
Description: DEXTools provides information about all of the decentralized markets in conjunction with an app and ecosystem that is meant for traders. DEXTools lets you view all blockchain data in one UI, so that you have a clear overview of your trades, investments, and the cryptocurrency market at any given moment.

Name: Metronome
Description: Metronome is the world's first autonomous cryptocurrency and an open-source crypto project that aims to optimize for self-governance, reliability, and portability. It was designed to be used in scenarios where reliability is the determining factor, such as a decentralized exchange of value across blockchains and advanced payment settlements. However, many communities and institutions will be able to adapt its functionality to fit their needs.

Name: DarkCrypto Share
Description: DarkCrypto Share (SKY) is a part of the multi-crypto protocol DarkCrypto, based on the algorithmic coin DARK, pegged to CRO on the Cronos chain. SKY is one of the ways to measure the value of the entire protocol's trust in its ability to maintain DARK's peg to CRO. This is because during network expansion, the protocol mints DARK and distributes it proportionally to all holders of SKY tokens who have staked them in the boardroom.

Name: PKT
Description: Through PKT, the world's physical bandwidth infrastructure can be scaled at a cost-effective rate. A high-speed, low-latency PKT network provides access to the internet through mesh networking while reducing costs and improving transmission speeds. Every 60 seconds, network users mint and receive PKT cryptocurrency as a reward. The goal of the network is to become the world's largest peer-to-peer ISP (Internet Service Provider).

Name: BoringDAO
Description: BoradDAO is an institution that provides cross-chain services for every crypto asset. Users will receive a seamless, safe, and cost-effective transaction process when wrapping or transferring tokens. Using the BoringDAO oPortal Bridge, users will be able to send ERC-20 tokens to and from different blockchains in a safe and fast manner. USDT, USDC, and even ETH, which were originally issued on one chain, can easily be utilized in a multi-chain environment by using their underlying protocols.

Name: Freeway Token
Description: AuBit Freeway is a groundbreaking new asset management platform that will maximize the returns on the world's top investment products while minimizing risks. The platform offers unique platform benefits to the holders of their native utility Freeway Tokens (FWT) such as reduced fees and progressive rewards.

Name: Unifi Protocol DAO
Description: Unifi Protocol DAO offers users the opportunity to create DeFi solutions for their enterprises using the inherent security and decentralization characteristics of blockchain technology, as well as the automation of smart contracts. In this project, the Ethereum DApp and DeFi development framework is used to combine the power of several blockchains. Users will have access to multiple blockchains and an extraordinarily versatile token, allowing users to integrate the DeFi world with interoperability.

Name: Stader
Description: Stader gives you the greatest return on your stakes in the most convenient and safest way. As part of Stader's governance structure, the Stader token (SD) is its native token that accrues value every time it is used. In addition to building extremely modular smart contracts, Stater offers its components as a service so third parties are able to create custom solutions with our components.

Name: Step Finance
Description: STEP is a move-to-earn cryptocurrency that rewards users with their native tokens when they work out and stay fit. Making money and staying active has never been easier with Step! You can track your steps through their mobile app (available on both iOS and Android) and earn rewards in BNB based on how far you walk on the daily. It moreover syncs with other health apps such as Apple Health or Google Fit.

Name: SUKU
Description: SUKU is a blockchain-based ecosystem that helps creative brands and creators engage with audiences in a completely new way, both in the physical and virtual worlds. Brands and creators are able to thrive in the physical and virtual world thanks to the SUKU Ecosystem, which comprises a suite of engagement solutions.

Name: Epik Prime
Description: Epik is the leading global NFT licensing technology company with more than 300 video gaming clients. With the largest digital ecosystem featuring hundreds of the world's most popular entertainment brands, this project enables brands to integrate into video games to deliver premium digital products and experiences to over one billion players worldwide. Epik is widely regarded in the blockchain industry as the leader in offering collaborative blockchain solutions for the development of premium licensed digital collectables, cryptocurrencies and NFTs.

Name: Aragon Court
Description: Aragon Court is a platform for resolving subjective disputes that require the judgment of human guardians within the blockchain. It is built on top of the Aragon OpenStack software, and it is a plug-in arbitration platform accessible via API to decentralized applications (dApps).

Name: HOPR
Description: HOPR is a blockchain-based protocol that is aimed at solving global data and privacy concerns. HOPR aims to decentralize private data exchanges with an official initial coin offering (ICO) in 2021. In the next generation of privacy solutions, HOPR allows enterprises and private users to decide who has access to their personal and online information.

Name: V.SYSTEMS
Description: v.systems focuses on cloud and database services while providing blockchain infrastructure. Supernodes are elected in a distributed network based on Proof-of-Stake (PoS) principles, using the Supernode Proof-of-Stake (SPoS) consensus algorithm. The application provides transaction processing, smart contract creation, and mining capabilities.

Name: YIELD App
Description: Users can earn high returns from DeFi products with Yield's intuitive mobile app and web platform without having to go through a lengthy, complex and, often, costly learning process. As a bank-licensed investment fund, YIELD offers a team with FinTech and cybersecurity experience. The YLD token serves as the foundation for its strategy, rewarding community members and boosting their APY.

Name: Atari
Description: The Atari Token is a decentralized cryptocurrency developed to become a standard for the interactive entertainment industry. It was developed specifically for the needs of the interactive entertainment industry by Atari Chain Ltd., a subsidiary of Atari Interactive, which is a video game and consumer electronics company.

Name: Sentinel
Description: As the first scalable framework for dVPNs, Sentinel (DVPN) reduces the carbon footprint of the network by using shared resources. Rather than launch and maintain a single consumer-facing application, Sentinel dVPN will work as a network of decentralized VPNs. With the Sentinel ecosystem, the VPN industry is set to become decentralized and 'dVPN' will be introduced to consumers.

Name: Index Cooperative
Description: $INDEX tokens, issued by Index Coop, are a decentralized, autonomous asset manager. By voting on Snapshot, your $INDEX can be used to govern the Index Coop network. In addition to earning $INDEX rewards, you can also provide liquidity on decentralized exchanges for Index Coop products.

Name: Trias Token
Description: TRIAS stands for Trustworthy and Reliable Intelligent Autonomous Systems, a native-application-compatible execution platform, development framework, and collaborative ecosystem that supports all platforms. The project aims to define a new generation of public chain systems that are platform agnostic.

Name: Router Protocol
Description: Router Protocol is a crosschain liquidity aggregator that aims to facilitate infrastructure to seamlessly bridge between Layer 1 and Layer 2 blockchain solutions. It is designed to allow users to swap assets between different networks in a fast and cost-efficient way.

Name: Nimiq
Description: Nimiq is a blockchain where users always participate automatically, instead of using a third-party node to connect to the network, such as Ethereum or Bitcoin. The goal here is to make cryptocurrencies easier to use without sacrificing decentralization.

Name: Lazio Fan Token
Description: Lazio Fan Token, or LAZIO, is a token created by Binance with the purpose of providing ownership of the club’s governance to its holders, as well as letting them access exclusive promotions, unlock VIP rewards and gain special recognition.

Name: PAID Network
Description: PAID Network is a business toolkit with an emphasis on simplifying business contracts. The traditional legal contract system forces people to rely on business counsel and to use unnecessarily complex contracts. Thus, PAID Network aims to make business contracts easy to understand and have them signed on-chain.

Name: TerraKRW
Description: Terra is a network containing many stablecoins pegged to the major fiat currencies in the world. Terra KRT, for instance, is a stable asset with its value pegged to the Korean Won using algorithms to automatically expand or contract the money supply in order to maintain stability.

Name: Reimagined Finance
Description: Reimagined Finance is a Farming-as-a-Service (FaaS) platform running on both Ethereum and BNB, designed to yield farms on behalf of investors. Investors simply own REFI tokens to receive yields in ETH or BNB. The share of distributions will be directly proportional to how much REFI you own (1% of total REFI supply will lead to 1% of future distributions).

Name: Spectrum Token
Description: Spectrum Protocol is a yield optimizer on the Terra blockchain ecosystem, which automatically compounds and stakes users’ rewards according to their ratio settings. Spectrum Token (SPEC) is the reward token to investors that is also automatically staked into Spectrum governance.

Name: Inverse Finance
Description: Inverse Finance describes itself as a ‘positive sum DeFi protocol’ that helps users maximize their earnings through revenue sharing, accumulate sustainable, high yields, and enjoy low-cost stablecoin borrowing. Inverse Finance aims to become a major financial ecosystem in DeFi, creating meaningful opportunities for everyone using innovative, DAO-owned protocols.

Name: DarkCrypto
Description: DarkCrypto is the first algorithmic stablecoin pegged to CRO, using an algorithm that adjusts the stablecoin’s supply to maintain the price as close to the target price as possible.

Name: UXD Stablecoin
Description: UXD is an algorithmic stablecoin that is 100% backed by data neutral positions. Some of the perks of UXD are: anyone can instantly mint 1 UXD for 1 USD; UXD is censorship-resistant; the funding rate of the delta-neutral position will be distributed to stakeholders of UXD Protocol.

Name: Aventus
Description: The Aventus Network enables businesses to build a second-layer protocol on top of the Ethereum network to improve scalability, cost, and speed of Ethereum transactions. The network also allows applications to work with other blockchain technologies cross-chain.

Name: WaykiChain
Description: WaykiChain is a public blockchain providing decentralized finance infrastructure via implementations of decentralized exchanges (DEX) and crypt-asset backed stablecoin technologies. It claims to achieve an average transaction-per-second of over 3300 with a peak of 7800.

Name: Saber
Description: Saber describes itself as the leading exchange on Solana for cross-chain stablecoins and wrapped assets. It allows for low-slippage trading at large volumes and maintains high capital efficiency for investors at the same time.

Name: Hacken Token
Description: Hacken Token (HAI) is a cybersecurity coin from Hacken Foundation, an organization with a vision to unite all cybersecurity products Web 3.0 infrastructure.

Name: GoChain
Description: GoChain aims to be a network for developers to run decentralized applications with better energy efficiency than Bitcoin or Ethereum, while still being compatible with existing Ethereum wallets, smart contracts, and other tools. It does this by using a Proof of Reputation model which may consider the reputation of all network participants.

Name: SX Network
Description: SX Network, or SportX, is a community-owned sports betting exchange and a political prediction market. All bets are created, processed and settled on-chain, which anyone with a Web3 wallet can do. SX Network offers a level of privacy and transparency unprecedented in traditional centralized betting platforms.

Name: pNetwork
Description: pNetwork (PNT) is a decentralized platform that enables the transfer of assets, NFTs as well as smart contract interactions cross-chain by using pTokens to represent assets from one blockchain on another. PNT can be staked for voting rights in pNetwork’s DAO.

Name: Stratos
Description: Stratos describes itself as a ‘decentralized Data Mesh’ that provides scalable and reliable storage, database, as well as computation network, best used for scaling blockchain process capacity while maintaining decentralization.

Name: Adappter Token
Description: The Adappter platform aims to use the decentralization of blockchain to reward users for their contribution to the digital advertising industry and to protect their privacy by consenting to selective personal data to be used.

Name: Apollo DAO
Description: Apollo DAO is a Decentralized Autonomous Organization with a vision to build a “Warchest” that is bootstrapped by fees from their DeFi protocols and is a decentralized fund managed by veApollo stakers. The Warchest will accumulate crypto assets that benefit the growth of Apollo and stakers that provide revenue to grow the Warchest.

Name: Atletico Madrid Fan Token
Description: Atletico Madrid Fan Token (ATM) is a utility token on the Socios.com platform, operating on the Ethereum blockchain. ATM can be used to give its holders a share of influence on the Atletico Madrid club decisions, as well as to get exclusive rewards and perks.

Name: Comdex
Description: Comdex is a decentralized asset built on the Cosmos ecosystem with a vision to bridge the gap between CeFi and DeFi via providing access to financial products and services in the commodities space. Comdex enables the tokenization of these real-world assets with more ease than ever before.

Name: Friends With Benefits Pro
Description: Friends With Benefits, FWB, describes itself as a place where “crypto meets communities”, where “technology acts as a communal connective tissue”. Members of FWB are artists, creators, rebels, thinkers and doers that work together to create a better future.

Name: OccamFi
Description: OccamFi is a decentralized launchpad for the Cardano ecosystem. Some attractive features of OccamFi are: fixed price mechanics, auction mechanics for projects with non-standard value propositions, private and public pools for seed funding, community rating projects using governance features, community engagement mechanics (bounty hunting, referral system, and missions)…

Name: AirSwap
Description: AirSwap is a decentralized token trading network using a peer-to-peer (P2P) system, aiming to make trading tokens secure, convenient and free. AirSwap operates on the Ethereum blockchain and it offers 3 products named Instant, Spaces, and DexIndex.

Name: vEmpire DDAO
Description: vEmpire DDAO claims to be the biggest decentralized investment platform for Metaverse tokens. Users can stake Metaverse tokens to earn yields both in VEMP and the original token staked. Their mission is to make sure that web3 technologies like the Metaverse can be invested in by everyone and not just the wealthy.

Name: Lattice Token
Description: Lattice is an AMM-based (Automated Market Maker) decentralized exchange supporting seamless cross-chain swaps. It also supports a number of DeFi applications by using the Constellation’s Hypergraph, a near-zero fee and scalable decentralized network. Lattice offers access to a variety of features like lending, yield farming, launchpad, analytics…

Name: ScPrime
Description: ScPrime uses blockchain technology to create a cloud service by paying individuals to store data around the globe, utilizing smart contracts and cryptographic proofs to maintain accuracy and security.

Name: Taboo Token
Description: Taboo is an adult NFT and Streaming media project that offers exclusive contents featuring supermodels and pornstars. Taboo emphasizes on a NSFW media curation of the highest quality by being extremely selective with their adult performer hiring process.

Name: Sandclock
