Description: Sandclock is a multichain DeFi platform that aims to make capital ultra programmable by splitting principal from yield and allowing users to create their own strategies. The range of programmability spans from investment into DCA (Dollar-Cost Averaging) vaults, zero-loss donations/subscription services, to setting up DAO to facilitate exit liquidity.

Name: Yuan Chain Coin
Description: The Yuan Chain Coin takes inspiration from established crypto assets such as BTC, ETH, and integrates new innovative technologies to create a new blockchain network architecture. The YCC public chain claims to be able to process tens of thousands of transactions per second, and to both ensure the decentralization of the public chain and the property plus privacy of permitted chains.

Name: Sora
Description: Sora’s mission is to create a new economic system that decentralizes the concept of a central bank. It is a network that can be used to build a parachain blockchain that connects to the Polkadot relay chain and ecosystem with built-in tools for DeFi features. The Sora network focuses on atomic token swaps, bridging tokens to other blockchains, and creating programmable rules for digital assets.

Name: GenesysGo Shadow
Description: GenesysGo offers multiple services with an emphasis on building, configuring, and maintaining RPC servers and validator nodes.

Name: Ardana
Description: Ardana describes itself as a stablecoin hub, offering an on-chain asset-backed stablecoin and a stable asset decentralized exchange. The Ardana token, or DANA, is both the utility and governance token of the Ardana ecosystem.

Name: Mute
Description: The Mute.io platform utilizes MUTE tokens that to make cryptocurrency trading and DeFi more accessible to mass audiences. The MUTE token allows holders to participate in governance and earn fees from platform revenue.

Name: ADAPad
Description: Cardano ecosystem's first deflationary launchpad is ADAPad. With the upgrade called Alonzo, the Cardano ecosystem will be able to use smart contracts and decentralized finance (DeFi).

Name: Ternoa
Description: The Ternoa Application enables the creation of "Time Capsules" which are non-fungible tokens issued on the Ternoa Blockchain. These technologies help to encrypt, store, and transfer data in a secure way. Time capsules, containing personal information, can be passed from generation to generation.

Name: Permission Coin
Description: The leading provider of permission advertising for eCommerce is Permission.io. Permission.io and third-party e-commerce platforms are powered by the ASK Coin, which allows individuals to grant permission to use their data securely and monetize it. Consumers are rewarded with ASK when they interact with brands and content, building loyalty and trust.

Name: DogeBonk
Description: Based on the Binance Smart Chain, DogeBonk is a "fluffy token" with automatic yield generation and deflationary properties. The DogeBonk 5% tax applies to every transaction which is then distributed to other DogeBonkers for merely holding their tokens. To generate an ever rising price floor, another 5% tax is automatically added to the locked liquidity pool.

Name: Tokenlon
Description: Based on Ethereum blockchain technology, Tokenlon is a decentralized exchange and payment settlement protocol. By providing a secure, reliable, and smooth trading experience, Tokenlon DEX hopes to cater to the needs of the masses. LON serves as a utility token that aligns ecosystem stakeholders and encourages the expansion of the ecosystem.

Name: SpiritSwap
Description: Spiritswap Token is an exchange token that operates on the Spiritswap DEX. Spiritswap allows users to trade, farm, and stake, with more functionalities being developed.

Name: SwapXI Token
Description: Built on the Avalanche blockchain, SwapXI is a new unique social token that is responsible for implementation, value creation, and financial settlement of the SwapXI ecosystem. By creating a payment platform in synchronisation with streamers, viewers, and advertising companies, SwapXI provides a unique added value for the entertainment community.

Name: 0chain
Description: 0Chain is a platform for decentralized storage that provides data privacy, security, and private sharing. 0Chain assists businesses to become compliant with GDRP (General Data Protection Regulation) and CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act) and gaining transparency with zero liability.

Name: dotmoovs
Description: Sports performance will be revolutionized with Dotmoovs, a remote peer-to-peer sport competitive platform. With a simple video taken with a smartphone, Dotmoovs is able to score sports tricks and movements with an AI algorithm. Dotmoovs wants to change the world of sports competition by displaying NFTs of popular athletes and allowing players to monetize their skills.

Name: pTokens BTC
Description: Bitcoin is represented by the ERC-20 token pBTC. pBTC is the first instance of pTokens, making Bitcoin compatible with the Ethereum network. The value of BTC is intrinsically linked to that of Bitcoin since it is pegged 1:1 with real BTC.

Name: Hiblocks
Description: Hiblocks is a blockchain-based social media curation platform that offers tokenized rewards to users for engaging with the community. With Hiblocks, anyone can curate content and generate revenue using existing social media accounts.

Name: GamerCoin
Description: GamerCoin is the first licensed token for gamers and the native utility token of GamerHash, a mining platform with more than 600,000 users that mines cryptocurrency with gaming PCs. GamingHash's mission is to provide gamers with a simple and free tool for mining blockchains and putting idle computing power to use without them having to do much.

Name: LGCY Network
Description: LGCY Network is an open-source, DPoS (Delegated Proof of Stake) blockchain protocol with industry-leading transaction speeds and flexible utility. Powered by the Libertas Protocol, the network aims to be the world's most decentralized dApp blockchain.

Name: Instadapp
Description: Instadapp is a smart wallet that manages assets through a simple interface that is built on top of popular DeFi projects like MakerDAO, Compound, and Uniswap. It can be used by users with or without advanced technical or financial expertise. Using Instadapp, all of the users' DeFi positions can be viewed on the dashboard.

Name: Spartacus
Description: Spartacus is the Olympus fork on Fantom. Spartacus aims to build a decentralized currency protocol that is owned by the community.

Name: FC Barcelona Fan Token
Description: FC Barcelona Fan Token (BAR) is a utility token that was created in collaboration with Chiliz, a leading provider of blockchain-based financial technology solutions for sports and entertainment. Through the token, the football team will be able to engage with a global audience and bring the community closer together.

Name: Paribus
Description: Based on the Cardano blockchain platform, Paribus (PBX) is a cryptocurrency and a cross-chain protocol for lending, borrowing, and staking NFT. To enable its users to unlock liquidity and interact with markets without having to liquidate assets, Paribus supports both conventional and unconventional cryptographic assets.

Name: BTU Protocol
Description: BTU Protocol is a peer-to-peer booking protocol. By using BTU Protocol, consumers can conduct direct business (without commissions) with many types of service providers.

Name: ForTube
Description: Previously known as the Force Protocol, ForTube is a suite of distributed crypto-finance protocols that operate on an open-source blockchain. ForTube's main goal is to offer crypto-finance solutions to developers through its software development kit (SDK) and application programming interfaces (APIs) for the development of decentralized applications (DApps).

Name: Block Ape Scissors
Description: The Block Ape Scissors (BAS) ecosystem allows its users to play thrilling games with their altcoins, shitcoins, and memecoins and earn NFTs or other shitcoins as rewards. The goal of Block Ape Scissors is to create the most advanced and innovative player-owned economy on web3. Block Ape Scissor aims to become a key player in the blockchain gaming industry by combining its in-house developers with talented smart contract developers.

Name: THORSwap
Description: Developed on THORChain’s cross-chain liquidity protocol, THORSwap is a multi-chain DEX aggregator and an ideal interface for all THORChain services such as THORNames and synthetic assets.

Name: Civilization
Description: The first Decentralized Investment Fund globally, Civilization is owned and managed directly by its investors. CIV aims to transform how staking and investing are done, with the use of 100% auditable code and, ultimately, automated multi-strategy selection for maximum yield at minimum risk.

Name: BoringDAO
Description: BoringDAO is a DAO-driven decentralized bridge that connects all blockchain assets built for Web 3.0. BoringDAO is decentralized, permissionless, and has fast transactions while maintaining security and low cost.

Name: BUX Token
Description: BUX Token is the native utility token of BUX, a cryptocurrency exchange based in the Netherlands. The BUX Token allows investors to purchase cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin commission-free.

Name: veCRV-DAO yVault
Description: veCRV-DAO yVault is a token developed on the Ethereum blockchain.

Name: Mithril
Description: The Mithril (MITH) token is an ERC-20 social media token on the Ethereum platform. With Mithril, users and operators will get rewarded for their contributions to social media networks both new and old.

Name: Wing Finance
Description: Wing Finance (WING) is a DeFi platform that allows cross-chain collaboration between various DeFi products built specifically and with a dedication to the digital asset lending market. The decentralized governance model and risk control mechanism of WING are designed to promote a relationship that is equally beneficial for borrowers, creditors, and guarantors.

Name: Meter Governance
Description: Meter Governance (MTRG) is DeFi infrastructure with a metastable currency built into it. Meter Governance is a highly decentralized, high-performance side chain that can be used alongside Ethereum and connect to other blockchains.

Name: Metaverse Index
Description: The Metaverse Index aims to capture the trend of entertainment, sports, and business shifting to a virtual environment, where economic activity is carried out through blockchain technology.

Name: LiquidDriver
Description: LiquidDriver is the first liquidity mining dApp in the Fantom ecosystem that provides liquidity-as-a-service. Through LQDR, LiquidDriver’s native token, it aims to bring its users more utility, rewards, and long-term benefits.

Name: Chain Games
Description: By combining smart contract-based contests and advanced gameplay, Chain Game™ aims to be the next step up in Web 3.0 blockchain gaming. All of Chain Games' products are fully Ethereum, ERC-20, and Polygon compatible. Chain Games uses the CHAIN token as the primary medium of exchange for all entry fees and contest payouts.

Name: ZKSpace
Description: The ZKSpace platform is comprised of three main components: ZKSwap, a Layer 2 AMM DEX based on ZK-Rollups technology (a type of Level-2 scalable solution in the Ethereum network based on zero knowledge proof), ZKSquare payment service, and ZKSea exchange and marketplace for NFTs. With an entirely new user interface, support for NFT, unlimited token listing, smoother withdrawal, improved efficiency, and multi-chain support, ZKSpace aims to implement Ethereum Virtual Machine-compatible ZK-Rollups and provide the community with more layer 2-based products.

Name: UniLend Finance
Description: UniLend is a permission-less DeFi protocol that integrates spot trading and lending/borrowing functionality on the same platform. UniLend aims to open up the DeFi space to $29B of ERC20 tokens that cannot participate in DeFi. Thus, UniLend's motto is "unlocking the true potential of decentralized finance".

Name: governance ZIL
Description: Zilliqa's ecosystem utilizes GZIL as a governance token, allowing long-term token holders and frequent users to make decisions. In this way, GZIL holders can vote and make decisions on community and partner projects powered by GZIL, similar to the structure of a decentralized autonomous organization.

Name: HBTC Captain Token
Description: HBTC Chain's native token is the HBC token, which is a full tokenized innovative platform token introduced by HBTC Exchange. HBTC tokens represent the three core businesses of the Bluehelix group, which include HBTC Exchange, HBTC Chain, and Bluehelix Cloud SaaS and white label solutions (a fully supported product or service that's made by one company but sold by another).

Name: Counterparty
Description: Built on the Bitcoin blockchain, Counterparty is a decentralized platform for creating and exchanging custom tokens. In addition, Counterparty also supports decentralized smart contracts.

Name: OneLedger
Description: OneLedger is a provider of Blockchain as a Service (BaaS) solutions, using its own blockchain technology to support its business customers. With OneLedger, businesses can integrate blockchain technology into their specific products and applications. In partnership with Google Cloud and IBM, the company focuses on blockchain technology applied to Healthcare, Asset Management, and Supply Chain.

Name: Vivid Labs
Description: VIVID (formerly VideoCoin Network) is the next-generation NFT publishing platform powered by the VID token. Vivid enables anyone to design, manage, and sell multimedia NFTs, enabling new use cases and business models, and transforming NFTs into complete media experiences. VIVID offers advanced NFT + features that transform simple NFTs into rich media experiences that are multi-format, multi-asset, permissioned, updateable, and resilient across all major blockchains.

Name: Crypto Raiders
Description: Crypto Raiders is an NFT-based dungeon crawler RPG on Polygon. In addition to completing dungeons, dueling, leveling up, and choosing their build, characters also own their in-game assets. The RAIDER token represents Crypto Raider's overall economy since it allows holders to earn a share of all revenue generated by in-game purchases and activities.

Name: Era Swap Token
Description: Era Swap is a decentralized utility token that can be used in a variety of different applications within the Era Swap Ecosystem, including Time Swappers, Swappers Wall, BuzCafe, TimeAlly DApp, BetdeEx, ComputeEx, and TimeAll.

Name: Symbiosis Finance
Description: Using Symbiosis Finance, decentralized exchange liquidity across EVM networks and non-EVM networks can be aggregated. Symbiosis addresses two problems: liquidity fragmentation across multiple blockchain networks and poor user experience while using DeFi and web3 economy.

Name: STAKE
Description: xDai (STAKE) is a cryptocurrency that is pegged to the US dollar. xDai is a stable payment blockchain that is designed to make transactions fast and inexpensive. STAKE is a multi-chain staking token designed to protect the payment layer. As a result of staking, validators and delegators give consensus to transactions while also receiving staking incentives, which are only needed for consensus providers, not everyday on-chain transactions.

Name: Glitch Protocol
Description: GLITCH is a fast, interoperable, blockchain-agnostic protocol specifically designed for DeFi. GLITCH focuses solely on decentralized financial applications and trustless money markets. As a result of GLITCH's revenue-sharing model, all ecosystem participants are rewarded and low network fees are guaranteed, eliminating the costly fee structure found on other blockchain platforms.

Name: Lyra Finance
Description: Built on Ethereum, Lyra Finance is an open protocol for trading options. Lyra is the first market-based, skew-adjusted pricing model that enables traders to buy and sell options that are accurately priced. Additionally, Lyra quantifies and actively hedges the risks that liquidity providers face, encouraging them to participate. LYRA is the native utility token that serves three functions: depositing in the security module to backstop the protocol, voting to determine how network resources are allocated, and providing incentives for traders and liquidity providers.

Name: Ekta
Description: Ekta, the first blockchain that enables physical assets and communities to be stored on its blockchain, has successfully launched its cross-chain mainnet and is heading towards its public debut. Ekta aims to create profit with a purpose by connecting the physical and digital worlds. By tokenizing real-world assets, Ekta integrates traditional businesses with blockchain technology and opens up new economic opportunities for regular people.

Name: PearDAO
Description: The PearDAO is a non-custodial marketplace that facilitates the trading of all things tradable against on-chain assets, managed by the community-driven DAO. In a similar trend to centralized e-commerce platforms like eBay and Amazon, PearDAO (PEX) will complement the CEX and DEX-driven cryptocurrency ecosystems by enabling value exchange between on-chain, off-chain, and cross-chain ecosystems.

Name: Solend
Description: Built on Solana, Solend is a decentralized algorithmic protocol for lending and borrowing that lets you earn interest on deposits and borrow assets.

Name: Conscious Value Network
Description: CVN, or Conscious Value Network, is an innovative network that integrates decentralized storage and Layer 2 networking. The CVN technical architecture is comprised of four layers: the basic technology layer, consensus layer, protocol layer, and application layer, aiming at performance bottlenecks in large-scale, decentralized applications.

Name: InsurAce
Description: A decentralized insurance protocol, InsurAce is intended to provide DeFi insurance users with low premium and sustainable investment returns, while being reliable, robust, and carefree.

Name: Ariva
Description: Ariva is a cryptocurrency produced by Ariva Co. for active use in global and local tourism and travel networks in the near future. The Project is a worldwide B2C travel & tourism network. Members can make bookings with cryptocurrencies, earn crypto money from their reservations, and interact with local and international tourism service providers.

Name: StackOS
Description: StackOS is a protocol that empowers individuals to create a decentralized cloud where they can run any full-stack application, decentralized application, blockchain privatenet, and mainnet node.

Name: Popsicle Finance
Description: Popsicle Finance is an automated yield optimization platform that is cross-chain. By managing your cryptocurrency investment, it allocates it to multiple liquidity pools at exchanges to maximize yield. Doing so helps you take a more "hands-off" approach to yield optimization.

Name: Geist Finance
Description: Geist Finance (GEIST) is a lending and borrowing market based on one of DeFi's most comprehensive protocols: AAVE. As GEIST has no governance or ownership, it does not have a protocol treasury. Instead, 50 percent of the revenue generated by borrowing is distributed directly to stakeholder users.

Name: Shyft Network
Description: The Shyft Network (SHFT) is a public blockchain protocol that aggregates and embeds trust and validation into data stored in public and private ecosystems, as well as permissioned and permissionless networks. With SHFT, siloed datasets (a collection of data held by one group that is not readily or fully accessible by other groups within the same organization) can be bridged together, allowing context to be layered over raw data to yield meaningful insights.

Name: VIDT Datalink
Description: V-ID, a blockchain-based service, is designed to prevent document fraud and add value through the validation and verification of documents. A key mission of V-ID is to offer safe and secure digital asset certification and identification so that fraud and error cannot hinder society's digitalization progress.

Name: MarketMove
Description: MarketMove (MOVE)  is a project in the DeFi (Decentralized Finance) space that combines some unique use cases that rely on artificial intelligence (AI) driven contract audit. A variety of exchanges offer MOVE tokens for purchase, sale, or trade, such as PancakeSwap (V2), Coinsbit, LATOKEN, etc.

Name: NFTY Token
Description: NFTY is a cross-chain Web3 authentication layer. As a verifiable ownership token, NFTY holders benefit as owners of the ecosystem currency that enables access to metaverses, gated content, experiences, communities, and much more by automating the use of the token to access those areas.

Name: Chain Guardians
Description: ChainGuardians is arguably the first ecosystem to combine traditional gaming concepts with blockchain technology to empower player-driven economies. As part of the ChainGuardians ecosystem, players have access to the free-to-play NFT mining platform and role-playing game. In this way, players earn income, turning their efforts into a tangible reward.

Name: Universe.XYZ
Description: Universe.XYZ is a social media marketplace for NFTs built around services like auctions, minting, galleries, forums, and social media to streamline community engagement. xyzDAO powers the Universe.XYZ NFT marketplace, which is 100% decentralized.

Name: Unisocks
Description: Unisocks (SOCKS) is a non-fungible token (NFT) currently listed on the Uniswap exchange. Users can purchase this pair of limited-edition socks from any location in the world. SOCKS holders can sell them through the Unisocks platform at any time. Additionally, the token can also be redeemed for the pair of socks it represents.

Name: 88mph
Description: 88mph (MPH) is a token that lets you lend your crypto assets at a fixed interest rate with infinite liquidity.

Name: DeXe
Description: DeXe (Decentralized Social Trading Platform) is a cryptocurrency asset portfolio platform that is decentralized and autonomous. DEXE is used as a staking token in this yield farming platform. DEXE tokens are supposed to enable an open and permissionless system.

Name: ELYSIA
Description: ELYSIA is a decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) that will provide the technology and incentives required to digitally transform real-world assets. ELYSIA allows anyone to purchase and sell fractional interests in real estate properties and receive equal ownership interest. The EL token is used to facilitate various transactions on the platform, as well as to pay fees. The token will be burned quarterly.

Name: Zombie Inu
Description: Zombie Inu (ZINU)  is the first fully animated and movable 3D NFT in the industry. It is capable of walking, running, flipping, dancing, and flying. ZINU will star in his very own NFT video game.

Name: ERC20
Description: Index ERC20 is the first tokenized index of cryptocurrency to track and invest in 20-top tokens, which offers weekly dividend payments in Ether to TOP-20 holders on their wallets, complete advertising, and development of the ERC20 index.

Name: Terra World Token
Description: The Terra World metaverse is built on top of Terra Luna's ecosystem, and it facilitates connections, interactions, economy, and more. Terra World will allow users to access the wonders of the blockchain and begin their journey into the metaverse. Terra World Token (TWD) is Terra World's native token for governance and usage.

Name: TRONPAD
Description: TronPad is the only IDO (Initial Dex Offering) platform supported by the Tron Network. By distributing tokens and raising liquidity through TronPad, cryptocurrency projects will be empowered.

Name: BYTZ
Description: The BYTZ currency is a decentralized peer-to-peer currency utilizing the Delegated Proof of Stake algorithm to empower content creators with transparent analytics and blockchain tokenization. In addition to serving as a currency, BYTZ can also serve as a premium entertainment platform’s digital payment option.

Name: Lunar
Description: The Lunar (LNR) token is a BSC token that provides passive earnings to holders and is the connective tissue of the Lunar ecosystem.

Name: PowerPool Concentrated Voting Power
Description: PowerPool Concentrated Voting Power (CVP) is a governance token for the PowerPool protocol. Through CVP, participants are able to decide how pooled Ethereum governance tokens are used for voting between their respective protocols, in addition to governing the PowerPool protocol itself.

Name: Bread
Description: Bread is a simple and secure bitcoin wallet. Bread wallet users can pay for services using the BRD digital asset token. The BRD tokens are based on Ethereum in accordance with the ERC20 standard.

Name: Tranquil Finance
Description: The Tranquil Finance (TRANQ) protocol runs on Harmony ONE's blockchain. Through supplying and borrowing assets in a completely permissionless and decentralized way, it allows users to receive or pay interest. Market-based lending and borrowing rates are set, and loans are over-collateralized to ensure solvency.

Name: Quantum Resistant Ledger
Description: The Quantum Resistant Ledger (QRL) is a blockchain platform designed specifically to prevent hacking by quantum computers.

Name: Cake Monster
Description: A token on Binance Smart Chain, Cake Monster is an ultra-deflationary, dividend yield and meme token. A multitude of DeFi features is offered in order to build a flexible and multifaceted reward system throughout the entire protocol ecosystem without compromising sustainability or security.

Name: REVV
Description: Animoca Brands' blockchain motorsport games use REVV (REVV) as an in-game currency. This ensures the sustainability of the gaming economies in F1 Delta Time, MotoGP Ignition, and REVV Racing. By implementing the concept of play-to-earn, gamers are rewarded with cryptocurrency for their contributions to the game world.

Name: Hot Cross
Description: Hot Cross is a comprehensive multichain and cross-chain toolset that allows blockchain teams and communities to prosper. Hot Cross is designed to be the best toolbox for both ETH and EVM networks.

Name: Alkimi
Description: Based on the Constellation Network's Hypergraph, Alkimi Exchange offers decentralized advertising. Alkimi Exchange uses the OpenRTB standards for programmatic advertising (automatic trading of digital advertising space) to host a media exchange auction in real-time on the Hypergraph by developing a hosted state channel, AlEx.

Name: ParagonsDAO
Description: Previously known as ParallelDAO, ParagonsDAO is a blockchain-powered gaming ecosystem that is an economic and social partner DAO. At launch, ParagonsDAO’s main focus is on the groundbreaking Parallel TCG. The holders of PDT tokens control DAO-held assets (Masterpieces, Catalyst Drives, Prime Keys, etc.) whilst jointly participating in governance and growth by hosting tournaments, sponsoring players, creating content, and anything else the DAO chooses.

Name: FOAM
Description: FOAM is an open-source, low-cost network of terrestrial radios powered by the Ethereum blockchain and enabling crowdsourced mapping. FOAM's mission is to build a consensus-driven map of the world, providing verifiable location data to a fully decentralized web3 economy.

Name: LBRY Credits
Description: Liberty Credit (LBRY) is a platform that aims to simplify the way that digital content is distributed and accessed by producers and consumers alike. The decentralized model of Library Credit provides fairness, freedom, and openness to all parties.

Name: Hoge Finance
Description: Formerly known as Hogecoin, Hoge Finance (HOGE) is an ERC20 token on the Ethereum blockchain with a 2% transfer tax. HOGE is a deflationary cryptocurrency asset since part of that tax is passed on to holders and the other part is burned.

Name: RSS3
Description: RSS3 is the next-generation feed standard on Ethereum, which aims to support efficient and decentralized information distribution.

Name: Lunr Token
Description: Lunr is a utility token built for LunarCrush. The LunarCrush platform offers actionable insights for cryptocurrency investors by distilling global social media data.

Name: Offshift
Description: Built on Ethereum, Offshift is a cryptographically private offshore storage & DeFi protocol. XFT is the ERC-20 utility token that grants entry into the Offshift ecosystem and allows users the ability to shift to and from zkAssets.

Name: Jade Protocol
Description: Jade Protocol is a decentralized Venture Capital fund. Venture Capital (VC) is a form of private equity and a type of financing provided to startups by investors who believe the companies will have long-term growth. Jade Protocol is a DAO that makes careful bets from its treasury, some of which will rocket in value and benefit the entire ecosystem.

Name: Inter Milan Fan Token
Description: Using Socios' application and services, the Inter Milan Fan Token gives Inter Milan fans a tokenized share of influence on club decisions.

Name: Altair
Description: Altair is a network designed for those who want to test the limits of asset financing. Users can tokenize and fund their most ambitious projects through Altair.

Name: VEED
Description: In the VIMworld Ecosystem, VEED tokens are used for a variety of services, including VIM feeding, trading, adoption, farming, rewards, governance, and more.

Name: Ultiledger
Description: The Ultilegder protocol is an open-source global self-governing blockchain that aims to achieve community consensus and co-governance. Utiledger is building a financial and economic ecosystem based on the token "ULT" to help organizations build trust at a low cost and build a distributed financial bookkeeping system with bank-grade security.

Name: Pibble
Description: Pibble (PIB) is a blockchain-based cryptocurrency that gathers creators and consumers and rewards them for the activities they carry out. By becoming a vast platform for Posting, Commerce, Charity, Crowdfunding, and every other social activity, Pibble will create a new era of social media.

Name: Everest
Description: Everest (ID) aims to remove barriers to public services and bring economic inclusion through blockchain technology. Everest combines a massively scalable payment service (EverChain), a multi-currency wallet (EverWallet), a native biometric identity service (EverID), and a flexible value tracking token (CRDT).

Name: Delta Exchange Token
Description: The Delta Exchange is a cryptocurrency exchange that trades bitcoins and other cryptocurrencies such as ether and ripple. Delta Exchange's mission is to provide deep and liquid derivative markets to crypto investors across the globe. The Delta Exchange Token (DETO) is an ERC-20 utility token and rewards token that will power Delta Exchange and be integrated throughout its value chain.

Name: Jones DAO
Description: A yield, strategy, and liquidity protocol for options, Jones DAO (JONES) provides vaults that provide 1-click access to institutional-grade options strategies, while unlocking liquidity and capital efficiency for DeFi options with yield-bearing options-backed asset tokens.

Name: Apollo
Description: The APL token is considered to be the fastest and most feature-rich cryptocurrency. It is widely used in Apollo's products. In addition to being used for consumer use cases, APL is used in government and commercial sectors.

Name: Goldfinch
Description: Goldfinch (GFI) provides crypto loans without collateral. By expanding access to capital in emerging markets and providing a stable yield to lenders, Goldfinch also enables the empowerment of financial inclusion in emerging markets.

Name: DeFi Land
Description: DeFi Land (DFL) is a multi-chain agriculture-simulation game created to gamify Decentralized Finance. DeFi Land boasts similar features from traditional platforms all in one place. Players can start playing the game for free, grind their way up to the play-to-earn tier, compete with others, craft, trade, and more.

Name: Oraichain Token
Description: Oraichain (ORAI) is the world’s first AI-powered oracle platform. Oraichain integrates Artificial Intelligence APIs into smart contracts, creating a platform on which to build a new era of smart contracts and digital applications leveraging AI technologies.

Name: Stronghold Token
Description: The Stronghold Token (SHX) is a cryptocurrency token that runs on the Stellar platform. The mission of Stronghold is to provide fast, secure, and accessible financial services to all. It provides access to legacy and next-generation payments and financial services through its developer APIs.

Name: Hegic
Description: Powered by hedge contracts and liquidity pools, Hegic (HEGIC) is an on-chain options trading protocol on Ethereum (ETH). Hedging contracts are options-like, on-chain contracts that give the holder or buyer the right to buy or sell an asset at a certain price (strike) and impose an obligation on the writer or seller to buy or sell the asset at a certain time.

Name: Reddcoin
Description: Reddcoin (RDD) is a digital currency that can be used for tipping and social payments. The cryptocurrency aims to be an easy-to-use mode of payment that can be transferred at a low cost through the Redd Network. As with SnapCash and Facebook Cash, users can also use it to make payments on most social media platforms, allowing them to conduct transactions with their friends and followers.

Name: Cryptex Finance
Description: The Cryptex Finance (CTX) protocol is an Ethereum-based platform that gives investors, traders, funds, and DeFi users access to the total crypto market capitalization. Cryptex is able to build decentralized financial solutions such as Total Market Cap Token, TCAP, and many others using Ethereum's smart contract system.

Name: Kylin Network
Description: Kylin Network is a data blockchain that serves as the connection between the ‘real world’ and the Polkadot blockchain, helping to verify truth and providing insights. The token of the Kylin Network Mainnet, KYL, is used to secure and power the network.

Name: Santos FC Fan Token
Description: Santos FC Fan Token (SANTOS) is a fan token of Santos FC, a Brazilian sports club in the state of Sao Paulo, launched on the Binance Launchpool. Fan tokens can be used to gain access to exclusive content or club recognition.

Name: Tulip Protocol
Description: Tulip Protocol is the first decentralized yield aggregator on the Solana blockchain that comes with auto-compounding vault strategies. It takes advantage of Solana’s low-cost and efficient blockchain to provide higher APYs to stakers without them having to actively manage their funds. By providing liquidity on the protocol, stakers earn interests as well as TULIP, the native governance token of Tulip Protocol.

Name: Guild of Guardians
Description: Built on the layer-2 blockchain Immutable X, Guild of Guardians is a fantasy action RPG game that features play-to-earn mechanics. Players assemble a team of heroes, train them to collect resources and engage in challenges. The in-game currency, Gems, can be redeemed for real money, used to mint new assets and to vote on game decisions.

Name: Dora Factory
Description: Dora Factory is a programmable open infrastructure on Substrate, used for building DAOs. The infrastructure enables the creation of quadratic voting, bonding curve fundraising, and other on-chain governance features.

Name: PUTinCoin
Description: PUTinCoin is a cryptocurrency created to pay tribute to the people of Russia, aiming to support the Russian economy. It uses both the PoW and PoS consensus.

Name: Trisolaris
Description: Trisolaris claims to be the best decentralized exchange on the Aurora engine, a blockchain operating in the Near ecosystem. Trisolaris offers a user-friendly UI, fast transaction speed and low costs, the ability to swap any ERC-20 coins, and liquidity mining incentives.

Name: WeGro
Description: WeGro is a platform for people to participate in the hemp and cannabis industry. Holders of WeGro Coin directly influence the long term future of the cannabis supply chain, while their data is monetized in a democratic way, and its benefits go back to the community.

Name: Pangolin
Description: Pangolin is a DEX that runs on the Avalanche blockchain. It uses the same AMM model as Uniswap and its native governance token PNG can be traded with all tokens issued on Ethereum and Avalanche. Pangolin focuses on fast and cheap trades, community-driven development, and fair, transparent

Name: AXEL
Description: AXEL offers software solutions that incorporate blockchain technology. One of its products is AXEL Go, a cloud storage and file-sharing application that uses a decentralized infrastructure. The AXEL token is a PoS utility token that powers data transfer across the AXEL Go platform and the AXEL network.

Name: Vertcoin
Description: Vertcoin is a fork of Litecoin that uses the proof-of-work consensus mechanism. Vertcoin’s priority is to be ‘The People’s Coin’, that is to keep its mining decentralized and enable everyone with a computer to participate in the Vertcoin network. As a result, Vertcoin offers a 1-click miner to make mining more mainstream.

Name: Sentivate
Description: Sentivate is a hybrid web taking elements from both centralized and decentralized webs with a goal to create a network better than them. Sentivate aims to solve the bandwidth crisis, outdated protocols, lack of accountability and identity, broken DNS servers, and more.

Name: Orion Money
Description: Orion Money has a mission to become a cross-chain stablecoin bank and DeFi hub where users can maximize the profits from their stablecoins by accumulating and lending. Orion Money claims to offer a higher fixed income from staked stablecoins than anywhere on the market. ORION, the native token of Orion Money, can be used to boost stablecoin APY and to contribute to the governance of the system.

Name: Premia
Description: Premia aims to be a next generation options AMM by providing the best prices to users and also offering P2P derivatives trading and capital efficiency. Moreover, Permia has a heavy emphasis on research, with the vision to facilitate open access to the top DeFi research and innovation.

Name: Opacity
Description: The Opacity token, OPCT, can be used to purchase data storage plans on Opacity, which will be 100% private and can only be accessed with the private key given to the purchaser. Files stored on Opacity can be music, videos, images, documents…

Name: FloorDAO
Description: FloorDAO claims to be a decentralized NFT market-making protocol that creates deep liquidity for all NFT collections in its treasury. It achieves this goal by utilizing the ‘bond and rebase mechanisms’, pioneered by OlympusDAO, and strategies like NFTX vaults.

Name: PolkaFoundry
Description: PolkaFoundry offers a blockchain built on Substrate that is EVM-compatible and works as a Polkadot Parachain or parathread, as well as a variety of DeFi-friendly services for building dApps.

Name: Media Licensing Token
Description: The Media Industry Licensing Content (MILC) project aims to use blockchain and AI technologies to allow media viewers to participate in global media value chain through the MILC platform and the Media Licensing Token (MLT). The MILC project is designed to facilitate global availability of all video content, complex licensing for the entire industry, to make the discovery process easier for buyers, and to get early feedback from the audience.

Name: Dego Finance
Description: Dego Finance is an open, indeendent NFT ecosystem with DeFi tools. Users of DeGo Finance can launch their own NFT, start the mining, auctions and trading.

Name: Alchemist
Description: The Alchemist project was started with a tweet; it’s not a company and contains no developer team. It simply claims to be a community of alchemists figuring out what to build without a roadmap.

Name: Polkamarkets
Description: Polkamarkets is a DeFi Prediction Market where users can monetize their forecasts of future real world events within a decentralized infrastructure. In addition, Polkamarkets also have entertainment features like NFT-based games, live streaming for in-play positions on Esports and Sports, as well as daily crypto price market.

Name: PAC Protocol
Description: PAC Protocol is a PoS decentralized network, aiming to provide blockchain network solutions to solve real-world problems. It claims to be one of the largest masternode networks with over 22,000 active nodes around the globe.

Name: Stake DAO
Description: Stake DAO is a DeFi platform that offers users the most effective investment strategies by taking advantage of the DeFi ecosystem. The Stake DAO token (SDT) is a governance token but it can also be staked to earn fees generated by the DAO’s product.

Name: XELS
Description: XELS uses blockchain and other technologies to strive for a better environment on the planet, allowing people to mint carbon credits as NFTs. The platform also uses satellite imagery and AI to quantify the amount of carbon being neutralized by restoration efforts in Japan and Australia.

Name: Dragonchain
Description: Dragonchain describes itself as a hybrid blockchain targeted towards small businesses, enterprises, and developers. The hybrid nature of the blockchain enables easy integration with external blockchains, legacy systems, third party oracles and other data.

Name: Strong
Description: Strong, also known as StrongBlock, is a blockchain protocol offering a node-as-a-service tool which allows normal people without prior coding knowledge to contribute to securing blockchains by rewarding nodes for supporting the blockchain infrastructure.

Name: PIVX
Description: Protected Instant Verified Transaction (PIVT) is a decentralized, open-source project focusing on providing users with financial data protection. PIVT uses a PoS consensus mechanism with PIV being its native cryptocurrency.

Name: DOSE
Description: DOSE’s vision is to use game design techniques and play-to-earn mechanics to help people improve their physical shape and earn revenue through gaming activities. DOSE is also the name of the ecosystem’s native currency, earned by completing workout-based games.

Name: Cardstack
Description: Cardstack aims to build a software that will simplify the developing process for NFTs, DeFi, crypto, and blockchain, so that people without much experience can still build apps, create content and get paid in these spaces.

Name: Umbrella Network
Description: Umbrealla Network is a community-owned, decentralized oracle service, which facilitates secure and scalable data solutions for decentralized apps. The utility token of the platform is UMB, used for staking and voting.

Name: MultiVAC
Description: MultiVAC describes themselves as a pioneer in providing flexible computing frameworks with an emphasis on sharding, a technique of splitting a blockchain into different pieces to place less burden on the required computational power of each node. MultiVAC offers an all-dimensional sharding technology to achieve high scalability and an increased number of shards for better performance.

Name: MCDEX
Description: MCDEX is a decentralized exchange for futures trading, built on both Arbitrum and Binance Smart Chain. The exchange prioritizes censorship resistance and security, while featuring an AMM to enable everyone to provide liquidity for traders.

Name: Trabzonspor Fan Token
Description: Trabzonspor Fan Token is a fan token for one of the most decorated football clubs in Turkish, running on the Socios.com and chiliZ platform. These tokens can represent ownership or share of the club, and they can be used to vote for future club decisions or to claim exclusive rewards.

Name: Kuma Inu
Description: Kuma Breeder is a protocol used for farming Kuma Inu tokens (KUMA). It has a fair distribution system to make sure everyone in the community can benefit from Kuma Breeder’s farming pools. KUMA holders can vote in the DAO to control future marketing and development decisions.

Name: Safe Haven
Description: Safe Haven provides a variety of asset management solutions focused on B2B2C clients, such as digital inheritance, distributed back up, wallet, ID management, marketplaces, and smart payment solutions. Its main service is digital inheritance, which basically means facilitating secure, decentralized data storage using blockchain technology.

Name: ANGLE
Description: ANGLE is the governance token of AngleDAO, whose services cover parameters tuning, protocol upgrades, deploying new stablecoins and collateral types, and handling yield strategies on collateral.

Name: LOOP Finance
Description: LOOP Finance claims to be the first DEX on the Terra blockchain that has incentivized liquidity pools. LOOP is the utility token of the platform with 2 main usages: to earn accumulative benefits from performing swaps on the exchange, and to vote in LOOP Finance’s DAO.

Name: Neos Credits
Description: Neos Credits, or NCR, is the native token of Neos VR, which is a metaverse engineered for a wide range of activities that can be useful to everyone. Some features in Neos VR include games, multimedia, sandbox for creator, builder and developer, and professional work tools.

Name: Pendle
Description: Pendle is a protocol that is built on Ethereum and Avalanche blockchains and used for yield trading. Users can earn fixed yield or yield exposure on their yield-bearing assets. Pendle helps to create tokenized ownership of users’ yield-bearing assets, which increases the versatility and potential of the assets.

Name: LikeCoin
Description: LikeCoin is a protocol and framework for decentralized publishing, which is to bridge media to web3 while guaranteeing ownership to the content’s metadata. LikeCoin’s publication framework can easily integrate with existing media platform as well as connecting with other blockchains, with built-in tools allowing creators to produce and manage their own web3 content.

Name: Ref Finance
Description: Ref Finance uses an Automated Market Maker DEX to offer swapping assets between Ethereum and NEAR, also giving users faster transaction speed and lower fees. It aims to become a gateway for people to get into the NEAR ecosystem.

Name: Validity
Description: Validity is a PoS blockchain with an emphasis on data and identity verification, custom assets, and decentralized voting. It contains the Validity SmartChain and the SmartChain ZeroClient, along with a VAL coin supply that is capped at 9 million.

Name: Coinweb
Description: Coinweb aims to offer blockchain interoperability for real-world usage, so it's actively collaborating with large traditional businesses. Coinweb’s architecture dApps built on it to have maximum interoperability to dramatically increase their efficiency and usefulness.

Name: Gemma Extending Tech
Description: Gem Exchange and Trading is a blockchain-based diamond and jewelry platform, where users can purchase over 10,000 products for low price. GXT is the native currency of this platform, used as exchange values.

Name: VFOX
Description: The RedFOX Labs offers many services such as RFOX Games, RFOX Marketplace, RFOX Media and RFOX Streaming Platform, which will all be combined into the RFOX VALT virtual world.

Name: Vidya
Description: Vidya’s mission is to gamify DeFi by producing games that use in-game assets with real value to create an emotion-driven, high-stake gaming experience.

Name: Internxt
Description: Internxt has a mission to create a better future where humans’ privacy rights are more respected, and they are releasing a variety of services all with that common goal as their focus.

Name: apM Coin
Description: apM Coin aims to facilitate a well-organized and integrated customer reward management system, which manages customer data and promotes sustainable customer relations, particularly targeted towards the Korean fashion market.

Name: UniCrypt
Description: UniCrypt offers a range of decentralized services with a goal to deliver disruptive, flexible and audited technology to the DeFi space.

Name: GAMEE
Description: GMEE is a utility token that can also act as a currency of purchase in play-to-earn games provided by the GAMEE platform. Players can earn GMEE by playing these games, and they can in turn use them to pay for entry fees to special tournaments or to vote on GAMEE’s roadmaps and distribution of reward pools.

Name: Concave
Description: Concave is a community-driven investment organization that develops innovative DeFi products and uses active treasury management to bring value to their stakers, with the best interest reserved for long-term stakers.

Name: Pandacoin
Description: The Pandacoin network claims to have a very low bar to entry for potential users and to allow stakers of Pandacoin to earn up to 2.5% APY. Using both PoW and PoS consensus mechanisms, Pandacoin can be used as day-today digital currency for any kind of services.

Name: Populous
Description: Populous claims to facilitate invoice liquidity for small and medium-sized enterprises for up to 90 days. It allows businesses to share liquidity pools, which enables P2P lending between enterprises.

Name: Realm
Description: Realm is a play-to-earn metaverse built on Ethereum and Polygon layer 2 solution. Players can explore/create virtual worlds, discover rare NFTs, earn and trade REALM tokens, and even interact with Realm via fiat.

Name: BigShortBets
Description: BigShortBets is a platform on Tor network designed to be an anonymous information marketplace and a blockchain futures trading tool. People can buy/sell information, create futures contracts on anything, with a MetaMask address as the only KYC needed.

Name: Dexlab
Description: Dexlab facilitates a token minting lab, a launchpad, and a decentralized exchange, all with the purpose to make launching on Solana easy. DXL is the native utility token of Dexlab, which can be used for transaction fees, staking, and governance.

Name: Fantohm
Description: Fantohm is a decentralized reverse currency protocol on the Fantom Network, aiming to make the FHM token a global medium-of-exchange currency that doesn’t need any help from fiat to back it. Each FHM token is backed by a cluster of crypto-assets, securing a price floor that it cannot fall below.

Name: Gamium
Description: Gamium claims to be the first decentralized social metaverse that connects all metaverses where players can have fun, explore, socialize, innovate and create. Gamium enables the creation of a digital identity that can be transferred to any web3 or metaverse application.

Name: O3 Swap
Description: O3 Swap is the first cross-chain aggregation protocol, designed to let people make cross-chain transactions with one click. Currently, O3 Swap supports Heco, ETH, Binance Smart Chain, and Neo, and it intends to expand to Polkadot, Polygon, Solana and others in the future.

Name: GivingToServices SVS
Description: GivingToServices aims to use innovative, tailor-made, decentralized financial tools to support the public service workers’ interests internationally who face greater and greater financial uncertainty.

Name: Gamestarter
Description: Gamestarter has a mission to set a new standard for funding indie games by creating an Initial Game Offering (IGO) launchpad, and a NFT-based platform and marketplace. It also has its own studio to build high-quality blockchain games such as Dark Frontier, Crypto Fight Club and Pixel Pix.

Name: ProximaX
Description: ProximaX is a platform that integrates blockchain technology with distributed and decentralized services like storage, streaming, database and enhanced smart contracts. It is designed to be an all-in-one platform which can be extended with more service layers and is available in private, public, and hybrid networks.

Name: Witnet
Description: Witnet’s job is to deliver valuable information and data to smart contracts, helping to enable DeFi creations such as derivatives, stable coins, price feeds… The Witnet blockchain is built from scratch using the Rust programming language, and it uses bridges to connect to multiple smart contract platforms.

Name: AXIA Coin
Description: AXIA aims to be a blockchain that can accelerate mass adoption by having superior economics. It claims to be the most inclusive and decentralized blockchain that is also fast, scalable, and interoperable. AXIA coin is the native currency of the network, having a limited supply that reduces according to the activities in the AXIA ecosystem.

Name: K21
Description: K21 is an art vault that facilitates liquid exposure to a collection of 21 original NFT artworks by a variety of influential contemporary, digital, and cryptonative artists.

Name: #MetaHash
Description: MetaHash is a decentralized network designed for the exchange of digital assets and for the building of decentralized applications (dApps). It is composed of 4 parts: TraceChain, MetaApps, MetaGate, and MHC, each one handling a different purpose, with MHC being the native token that can be used as payment in the network.

Name: Chainge Finance
Description: Chainge Finance is a decentralized exchange that offers a wider range of solutions for the derivative markets by implementing 3 DEXs in one: The Spot DEX, the Futures DEX and the Options DEX. Chainge Finance promises a great user experience with low fees, complete privacy, and cross-chain transactions.

Name: Bitcoin 2
Description: Bitcoin 2 is a Bitcoin fork that enables private transactions through the Zerocoin protocol and nearly instant payments through Masternodes. The Bitcoin 2 team claims to have reduced the size of the blockchain by 100 times to allow new nodes to get started much faster.

Name: Mobius
Description: Mobius is a mobile wallet app operating on the Stellar network that lets you store your crypto-assets as well as use them for payment. Mobius promises high security by having users’ secret seed stored locally on their device and having transactions signed only after users unlock the app with biometric security or their pin. Each transaction also takes 5 seconds and costs about $0.0000025 USD.

Name: B.Protocol
Description: B.Protocol is a backstop protocol that provides users with access to MakerDAO, Compound, and soon it will expand to other DeFi lending platforms. Users also get the added advantage of sharing liquidation proceeds correlating to proportional usage of the protocol. The BPRO token is the native governance token of B.Protocol.

Name: Navcoin
Description: Navcoin is an open-sourced cryptocurrency that offers both fast transaction speed and reliable privacy features. The Navcoin wallet enables users to make either public or private transactions, and they can also earn rewards through staking and mixing coins. The public NAV coins are convertible to xNAV, the privacy coin, with the rate of 1:1.

Name: Mint Club
Description: Mint Club is a smart token building platform for people with no coding knowledge. Users can create BEP20 tokens with a few simple clicks without the need to provide instant liquidity pools.

Name: Electra Protocol
Description: Electra Protocol is a PoS open-source platform with a goal to create a cryptocurrency that has a much lower than average processing fee rate for transactions. It aims to make its native coin, XEP, a global, popular payment option.

Name: Minds
Description: Minds is a decentralized social networking platform where people can create content and provide liquidity as a way to contribute to the network and in turn, will receive MIND tokens for their contributions. These tokens can be used to advertise your content on the network, tip other creators, and join premium memberships.

Name: vVSP
Description: Vesper facilitates a platform for DeFi products with an emphasis on ease of use, including a range of interest-yielding “Grow Pools” and more coming in the future. Users can earn the native token VSP via pool participation and use it to vote in the governance of the platform.

Name: Arsenal Fan Token
Description: Arsenal Fan Token (AFC) is the fan token of Arsenal FC, launched on the Socios.com app that runs on the Chiliz blockchain. AFC holders enjoy a variety of benefits, such as influence in decisions related to the team, earning exclusive rewards, and participating in quizzes and games.

Name: Notional Finance
Description: Notional claims to be the first decentralized protocol on Ethereum that allows borrowing and lending at fixed rates and terms. Currently, USDC and DAI are available on the platform’s on-chain liquidity pools for borrowing for up to 1 year, while ETH and WBTC can be borrowed for 6 months.

Name: Asch
Description: Asch aims to be an innovative blockchain application platform using multi-chain architecture.

Name: DeHub
Description: DeHub is a blockchain-based entertainment aggregator and producer of original motion pictures, exclusive pay-per-view events, and gaming projects. The whole ecosystem is powered by the DEHUB tokens, which can be used for staking and voting.

Name: Arcblock
Description: ArcBlock is a platform designed for the creation of dApps. It is composed of Blocklet Servers, each of which provides a fully-integrated blockchain framework that can be deployed on a range of platforms, such as public or private clouds, developer desktops, or bare metal machines. ArcBlock also offers intuitive UI to review and modify each Blocklet configuration to determine its behavior at runtime.

Name: Aquarius
Description: Aquarius has a goal to bring more liquidity to trading on Stellar and give control over how it is distributed across multiple market pairs. It creates a more usable DEX by introducing incentives for market makers and AMM liquidity providers on Stellar. The AQUA token acts as the currency for governance and reward.

Name: GM
Description: GM Wagmi is a meme coin based on the popular “gm” meme that basically stands for “good morning”, a common greeting between Twitter crypto accounts regardless of the time of day.

Name: Cardstarter
Description: Cardstarter is a launchpad and accelerator for DeFi projects on the Cardano blockchain. Projects on the launchpad have to go through Cardstarter’s quality assurance program. Moreover, the platform has an insurance fund to insure backers against financial loss due to DeFi exploits and Vaporwave.

Name: Bridge$
Description: Bridge$ aims to bring DeFi to everyone in a safe and innovative environment. It does this through a range of tools such as the Bridge$ DEX, which ensures listed projects are safe and innovative, and the Bridge$ token (BRG.X): a dividend-paying token with a stable supply.

Name: Zano
Description: Zano is a stable and secure coin designed to be used in e-commerce. Zano promises reliability, security and flexibility that makes it the perfect option for P2P transactions.

Name: Galatasaray Fan Token
Description: Galatasaray Fan Token (GAL) is a fan token for the Galatasaray Sports Club, the 22-time winners of the Turkish Super League, on the Socios.com platform. GAL can be used to vote on the club’s decisions, earn exclusive prizes, and get access to premium club membership.

Name: Uno Re
Description: UnoRe claims to be the first reinsurance trading platform on Polkadot, with the promise to remove entry barriers for investors regarding capital and regulations. It will also encourage the community to take part in the process of insurance and reinsurance as well as designing new insurance products.

Name: Invictus
Description: Invictus is a decentralized reverse currency built on Solana, with each Invictus token (IN) backed by a basket of assets such as USDC, USDT, mSOL & USDC LP tokens, giving the token an intrinsic value which it cannot fall below.

Name: Betu
Description: The BetU ecosystem is home to 3 connected platforms: BetU Verse, EarnU and BetU. BetU Verse is a virtual reality platform containing licensed metaverse resorts and casinos. EarnU is a play-to-earn sports/esports prediction game that BETU token holders can play for free. BetU is a crypto sports/esports betting platform.

Name: BLOCKv
Description: BLOCKv describes itself as a leading platform for minting and distributing NFTs. Besides, BLOCKv also provides extended reality experiences, global scavenger hunts, and creative solutions for businesses.

Name: BlockWallet
Description: BlockWallet is a non-custodial browser wallet that helps protect users’ privacy, creating a new address whenever users withdraw funds. BLANK is the utility token with the goal of securing liquidity of the platform.

Name: mStable Governance Token: Meta
Description: Meta (MTA) is part of a stablecoin infrastructure in which mStable (MUSD) is the stablecoin. MTA has 3 functions including coordinating governance, incentivizing the bootstrapping of mAssets’ liquidity, and empowering a decentralized community of Governors.

Name: DAOhaus
Description: DAOhaus helps people to distribute and monitor fund transfers from a shared treasury, which is a critical component to any DAO. DAOhaus also offers a marketplace of community-developed add-ons which facilitate custom functionality, and it also offers measures to protect members’ investment.

Name: FibSwap DEX
Description: FibSwap DEX allows people to swap crypto-assets between two different blockchain, similar to Uniswap.

Name: Sunny Aggregator
Description: Sunny is a DeFi yield aggregator which emphasizes on composability, allowing new apps and protocols to be built on top of it. Sunny Aggregator operates on the Solana blockchain with SUNNY being its governance token.

Name: Dinger Token
Description: Dinger Token aims to be the next generation of meme culture, which will enable any average person to launch their own meme token. The core concern for Dinger Token is investor protection, so it’s building a suite of products to facilitate that.

Name: DogeGF
Description: DogeGF is a platform on which people can give ‘kind gestures’ as a way to support projects they care about. The DogeGF token (DOGEGF) is the governance token of the platform.

Name: Infinity Pad
Description: Infinity Pad is a launchpad to help support promising projects on the binance Smart Chain. It supports fiat, has audited contracts, trustless escrow and other liquidity supporting tools.

Name: Polychain Monsters
Description: Polychain Monsters is a trading card game taking inspiration from the 90s Pokemon card trading with infused blockchain technology to give each monster unique properties and rarity. People can use PMON, a native ETH-20 token of the game, to purchase new monsters or unlock features.

Name: saffron.finance
Description: saffron.finance is a protocol designed to tokenize on-chain assets including smart contracts to provide better flexibility to liquidity providers. It also helps them gain uninterrupted access to their underlying collateral while enabling leveraged staking.

Name: MicroPets
Description: MicroPets is a custom dApps where users can go to purchase crates with PETs, which upon opening will give them a random NFT with various rarity and staking rewards. Then, users can either stake their NFT pet or sell it on the MicroPets Marketplace.

Name: Moon Nation Game
Description: Moon Nation Game claims to be the largest space-theme role playing game on Binance Smart Chain where players can go on a journey of exploring the vast space decorated with high-end graphics. MNG is the native token of the game used for rewards, liquidity tax, and other purposes.

Name: PolyDoge
Description: PolyDoge is a meme currency with one of the most lively communities on the Polygon network. PolyDoge holders can have access to NFTs, apps, airdrops and different DeFi platforms on Polygon.

Name: EQIFi
Description: EQIFi is a decentralized protocol for lending, borrowing, and investing with a wide range of options such as ETH, ERC-20 tokens, stablecoins, and some fiat currencies. It allows dApps to borrow assets without waiting for an order to close, speculators to deploy a wide range of trading techniques including shorting, and miners to borrow against a variety of collateral options.

Name: Gameswap
Description: Gameswap is a DEX for gamers to trade in-game assets in a neutral platform powered by DeFi and the native GSWAP token.

Name: Decentral Games ICE
Description: ICE is the token used in Decentral.Games’ ICE Poker: a free play-to-earn poker game. ICE is the deflationary in-game currency used in the Decentral.Games ecosystem to incentivize players’ liquidity.

Name: Blocto Token
Description: Blocto is a cross-chain smart contract wallet service built for users to easily interact with their NFTs, crypto assets and dApps, and for developers to onboard their project regardless of which blockchain they are built on. BLT is the utility and governance token of Blocto.

Name: WOM Protocol
Description: The WOM Protocol stands for ‘word of mouth’; it’s a blockchain marketing technology that can monetize word-of-mouth recommendations on any app or platform. It’s targeted towards brands, content creators, publishers and social networks.

Name: Niftyx Protocol
Description: Niftyx Protocol is a decentralized protocol for NFT trading and minting, with a goal to connect niche-focused international NFT markets to create a fair opportunity for everyone. It uses EVM-compatible standards and a 100% community-driven DAO governance model.

Name: Tarot
Description: Tarot is a lending protocol operating on Fantom Opera. People can either supply tokens to the lending pools to earn passive yields without impermanent loss, or deposit LP tokens in a pool to borrow.

Name: NFTb
Description: NFTb is a marketplace for NFTs, focusing on speed and affordability. People can create, sell and trade NFTs for a much cheaper price than other marketplaces. Every NFT on NFTb is minted on the Binance Smart Chain.

Name: Imperium Empires
Description: Imperium Empires is a space metaverse on Avalanche. It offers features like deflationary tokenomics through NFT burns in PvP battles, guilds where people can team up with their friends to play to earn, and a gamified DeFi ecosystem.

Name: HAPI
Description: HAPI is a decentralized security protocol that combines crypto intelligence data from both on-chain and off-chain sources to prevent any potential malicious activity in the blockchain space. HAPI claims to be the only cybersecurity solution that can be integrated into DEXes and DeFi protocols to prevent money laundering.

Name: Dimitra
Description: Dimitra is a blockchain platform designed to empower smallholder farmers globally to increase their earnings, reduce costs and mitigate risks. It does this by providing access to agricultural development practices like machine learning and satellite technology.

Name: CVI
Description: Holders of the GOVI token can participate in the governance DAO of the CVI protocol. They can vote on tradable assets, leverage used, fees, deposit amounts, etc…

Name: Darwinia Network Native Token
Description: Darwinia Network claims to be the first game chain on Polkadot, built on the Substrate framework, with a goal to become a Polkadot parachain in the future. The network provides a safe bridging solution to connect to Ethereum, TRON and other heterogeneous chains, enabling cross-chain asset transfers and remote chain calls.

Name: Aldrin
Description: Aldrin Exchange is building a DeFi ecosystem to facilitate powerful trading tools while at the same time simplifying DeFi for everyone. RIN is the native utility token of the platform.

Name: VCGamers
Description: VCGamers connects gamers to a social commerce platform, enabling them to buy/sell digital in-game items and gaming NFTs.

Name: Bomber Coin
Description: The Bomb Crypto is a play-to-earn game where players can collect, fight mosters as well as trade them for real money. Their job is to manage a crew of bomb heroes to search for BCOIN. Each hero is unique with different stats.

Name: Solrise Finance
Description: Solrise Finance is a decentralized, non-custodial asset management platform on Solana designed to enable anyone to become an investor with as little as $20. Users can trade on-chain perpetual futures contracts and swaps, as well as invest into and withdraw from any Solrise fund at any time.

Name: Yearn Lazy Ape
Description: Yearn Lazy Ape is an investment product with 5 Yearn stablecoin vaults LP tokens. It describes itself as a diversified cashflow-generating portfolio.

Name: Doge Dash
Description: In Doge Dash, players simply dash as fast as they can through 10 levels while collecting coins along the way which will be directly transferred to their wallets once they have completed all levels. The game’s goal is to bring crypto gaming to the mainstream audience.

Name: Werewolf Coin
Description: The Werewolf Exchange ecosystem offers decentralized finance-based apps like DEX, decentralized asset marketplace, finance gaming… Werewolf Coin (WWC) is both the utility token and governance token of the ecosystem.

Name: Gains
Description: GAINS stands for Group Action Is Never Small, aiming to be the best crowdsourcing platform accessible to everyone. Gains promises to hand-pick projects, considering its legitimacy, innovation of idea, and its capacity to execute its vision.

Name: Waves Ducks
Description: Waves Ducks is a NFT collectible game where players can collect and share ducks, as well as breed them to create new, unique, valuable ducks.

Name: Sakura
Description: Sakura is a network designed for cross-chain DeFi, aiming for high performance powered by the security of Kusama, a platform that provides a massively interoperable and scalable framework for developers. As a result, Sakura builders will be able to immediately develop DeFi apps with very loose governance guidelines.

Name: GNY
Description: GNY is a well-tested machine learning platform, described as a machine learning predictive platform for blockchains. It identifies repeatable patterns and learning aspects that constantly adapt to human behaviors. With GNY's data, advertisers can target users with contextually relevant messages and drive desired behavior.

Name: ADAX
Description: The ADAX token is the native token of the automated liquidity protocol ADAX, which is built on Cardano. The ADAX protocol is crucial to bringing DeFi into the Cardano ecosystem since it provides all components necessary for it to function. With the protocol, users can buy and trade tokens in a decentralized manner, simplifying transaction processes in the ecosystem.

Name: Bifrost Native Coin
Description: The BNC cryptocurrency is a Polkadot-based parachain that provides instant liquidity and staking without the need to nominate transactions. The Bifrost protocol enables changing proof-of-stake (PoS) tokens into vTokens (e.g. DOT can be changed into vDOT). Bifrost is dedicated to standardized and interest-bearing cross-chain derivatives in association with the Polkadot blockchain and other heterogeneous chains linked to it.

Name: Only1
Description: Only1 is an NFT-powered social media that's built on the most scalable blockchain to date — Solana. Not only does it allow you to buy and sell your favorite content creators' NFT but also to earn crypto through interactions. Furthermore, you can even mint your own NFTs and start earning rewards without a middleman.

Name: 0xBitcoin
Description: The 0xBitcoin (0xBTC) token is an Ethereum-based ERC20 token that can be mined. It is a scientific project to develop an ERC20 token with properties matching Bitcoin on the Ethereum platform. Essentially, the coin would follow the same formula as Bitcoin while running natively in the Ethereum EVM to achieve trustless custodianship for users.

Name: 0x_nodes
Description: Cross-chain liquidity platform 0xnodes enables Defi users to increase yield aggregation strategies with flexible synthetic asset movements between blockchains. Through the use of a core mesh network between EVM ecosystems, 0xnodes technology will facilitate seamless value transfer between blockchains, bridging the EVM network with external blockchain networks. In addition to providing new yield opportunities from EVMs to the mainnet, this unidirectional yield aggregation will simplify the experience for end users.

Name: Raptoreum
Description: Raptoreum is a hybrid proof-of-work/proof-of-stake blockchain whose purpose is to create positive global change by solving real-world issues. Besides providing an asset platform that allows tokenization, the open-source project also intends to allow DAPPs to work with smart contracts, which will be stored and executed at node level.

Name: Decentral Games (Old)
Description: This is the old token of Decentral Games (DG) which has split 1:1000 and upgraded to DG Governance V2.

Name: NAOS Finance
Description: NAOSF facilitates the interaction between DeFi lenders and SME borrowers on the blockchain without requiring any permission. With this project, loans can be originated and funded without the involvement of traditional intermediaries. With NAOS Finance, lenders can generate steady, recurring income streams while also accessing much bigger opportunities off-chain. In the end, they plan to fully automate the tokenization of real-world assets and implement them into their end-to-end lending solution, NAOS Finance.

Name: Etherisc DIP Token
Description: Etherisc is building a platform for decentralized applications in the insurance industry. The project aims to use blockchain technology to help make the purchase and sale of insurance more efficient. By implementing a number of measures, including the reduction of operational costs, providing greater transparency to the industry, and democratizing access to reinsurance investments, the project hopes to achieve this goal.

Name: Pegaxy Stone
Description: Pegaxy is a cryptocurrency of the blockchain-based game featuring mech-horse racing. Pegaxy is a play-to-earn metaverse where users can earn real-world value by participating in in-game activities. This game implements a dual token economy based on PGX (Pegaxy Stone) and VIS (Vigorus), two different governance tokens. A PGX holder can influence decisions on the platform and profit through stacking, while a VIS holder can facilitate trade within the game.

Name: IQeon
Description: IQN is an Ethereum-based token and an in-game currency. In IQeon, players earn IQN for their accomplishments by competing against each other in games, applications, and services.

Name: Deri Protocol
Description: With Deri, users are able to trade risk exposure precisely and capital-efficiently. In short, derivatives trading is done in a DeFi way: hedges, speculation, arbitrage, all on chain. As part of the Deri protocol, risks are tokenized in NFTs that can be imported into other DeFi implementations for their own financial purposes. Deri protocol has been hailed as one of the most important blocks of DeFi infrastructure for its ability to accommodate risks through an on-chain mechanism.

Name: MobieCoin
Description: A universal payments & rewards ecosystem, MobiePay enables consumers worldwide to make secure payments in fiat and digital currencies just by using their mobile phones. With MobieCoin™, their tokenized reward and payment system, customers can pay with both fiat and digital currencies, and receive cashback on purchases.

Name: Thales
Description: The Thales protocol is an Ethereum-based protocol that allows anyone to create peer-to-peer parimutuel markets. In addition to enabling novel on-chain initiatives, it also provides a platform for gamified positional markets.

Name: Enjinstarter
Description: Enjinstarter serves as a launchpad for Enjin ecosystem games and metaverse projects. It leverages Enjin's JumpNet platform and targets Efinity in its roadmap. Enjinstarter's stated purpose is to enable creators and game developers to establish communities and raise capital through crowdfunding campaigns. Additionally, the launchpad can be used to sell virtual items through NFTs as another way to raise capital. GameFi projects incubated by Enjinstarter receive full support, including help developing sustainable strategies and promoting their campaigns.

Name: SafeCoin
Description: SafetyCoin is a decentralized, community-driven project powered by a growing team of exceptional and dedicated individuals. It's the world's first full blockchain fork of Solana. In comparison to Solana, Safecoin offers a greater degree of efficiency, environmental friendliness, and community accessibility. Using SAFE, secure, and decentralized technologies like blockchain is essential for making humanity and the environment safer and more sustainable. Safecoin follows this vision and recognizes the importance of building a foundation that is safe, secure, and decentralized.

Name: Particl
Description: PART ensures data security and privacy through its digital currency. There are a number of technologies that enable secure transactions, such as Bulletproofs, RingCT, and stealth addresses. With the Particl blockchain, which is always updated to the latest version of the Bitcoin Core codebase, transactions are protected by Particl Proof-of-Stake (PPoS) along with cold staking.

Name: Smart MFG
Description: Smart MFG (MFG) is an ERC20 cryptocurrency token developed by Smart MFG Tech. It can be used in supply chains and smart contracts for manufacturing. With MFG you can incentivize RFQs, secure and pay smart contract POs (Purchase Orders), as well as tokenize supply chains.

Name: DappRadar
Description: DappRadar (RADAR) is a startup in the cryptocurrency industry that provides data to help users evaluate the newest decentralized applications (dapps) in the blockchain space. This project aims to broaden the coverage of emerging projects, provide more accurate and timely listings, build better portfolio tools, as well as offer more insightful reporting.

Name: SHOPX
Description: With SHOPX, businesses can make branded e-commerce NFTs, driving sales and engagement in the Web3 space. NFT-as-a-Service (NaaS) companies like Shopx offer the ability to create branded NFTs. Brands can create their own Web3 marketing strategy with the help of their solutions.

Name: DaTa eXchange Token
Description: DataBroker DAO, also known as DaTa eXchange (DTX), is a marketplace where sensor data can be bought and sold. Using Blockchain technology, Databroker DAO provides a decentralized marketplace for IoT sensor data, allowing sensor owners to generate revenue from generated data. As a result, various industries will benefit from this decentralized marketplace. This will improve the efficiency and productivity of data use.

Name: Nifty League
Description: With Nifty League, you can play nostalgic retro-style games on an NFT platform. The NiftyVerse includes upcoming NFT games with retro vibes reminiscent of classics such as Super Smash Bros. and Mario Kart. They have released their first play-2-earn game, "Nifty Smashers", bringing together players across Ethereum's mainnet!

Name: Lamden
Description: Lambda is a Python-based blockchain platform that makes it easy for everyone to use and build next-generation dApps. They provide tools that help developers speed up the creation of custom blockchains and applications

Name: DEEPSPACE
Description: DEEPSPACE is a play-to-earn strategy game that allows you to create your own civilizations, conquer lands, and discover unknown universes to earn money. The multiverse exploration game allows players to generate active as well as passive income. DEEPSPACE allows you to earn through exploration, trading NFTs, taking risks, or by simply HODLing $DPS tokens.

Name: Nash
